          description: Options for metadata extraction.
          examples:
            - title: true
              description: true
              language: true
              canonical: true
              robots: true
              author: true
              keywords: true
              favicon: true
              openGraph: true
              twitter: true
        cleaningProcessor:
          enum:
            - cheerio-reader
            - html-rewriter
          default: cheerio-reader
          description: The cleaning processor to use.
          examples:
            - cheerio-reader
            - html-rewriter
        htmlRewriterOptions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/HTMLRewriterOptions'
          description: Options for HTML cleaning with html-rewriter.
          examples:
            - extractMainContent: true
              removeBase64Images: true
        readerCleaningOptions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReaderCleaningOptions'
          description: Options for HTML cleaning with cheerio-reader.
          examples:
            - readerOptions:
                debug: true
        fetchOptions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FetchOptions'
          description: Options for the fetch request.
          examples:
            - method: GET
              headers:
                User-Agent: Deepcrawl-Bot/1.0 (+https://deepcrawl.dev)
                Accept: >-
                  text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
                Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
              redirect: follow
      required:
        - url
      title: LinksOptions
      description: Configuration options for links extraction operation
      examples:
        - url: https://example.com
          tree: true
    LinksSuccessResponseWithTree:
      type: object
      properties:
        success:
          const: true
          description: Indicates that the operation was successful
          examples:
            - true
        targetUrl:
          type: string
          description: The URL that was requested to be processed
          examples:
            - https://example.com
        timestamp:
          type: string
          description: ISO timestamp when the request was processed
          examples:
            - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
        requestId:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log entry
          examples:
            - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
        cached:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether the result was returned from cache
          examples:
            - false
        ancestors:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Array of parent URLs leading to this URL
          examples:
            - https://example.com
        metrics:
          type: object
          properties:
            readableDuration:
              type: string
              description: Human-readable representation of the operation duration
              examples:
                - 0.2s
            durationMs:
              type: number
              description: Duration of the operation in milliseconds
              examples:
                - 200
            startTimeMs:
              type: number
              description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation started
              examples:
                - 1704067800000
            endTimeMs:
              type: number
              description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation finished
              examples:
                - 1704067800200
          required:
            - readableDuration
            - durationMs
            - startTimeMs
            - endTimeMs
          title: Metrics
          description: Metrics for the links extraction operation
          examples:
            - readableDuration: 0.2s
              durationMs: 200
              startTimeMs: 1704067800000
              endTimeMs: 1704067800200
        tree:
          type: object
          properties:
            url:
              type: string
              description: The URL of this page
              examples:
                - https://example.com/about
            rootUrl:
              type: string
              description: The root URL of the website being crawled
              examples:
                - https://example.com
            name:
              type: string
              description: The display name or title of this page
              examples:
                - About Us
            totalUrls:
              type: number
              description: Total number of URLs discovered in the entire tree
              examples:
                - 150
            lastUpdated:
              type: string
              description: ISO timestamp when this page was last crawled
              examples:
                - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
            lastVisited:
              anyOf:
                - type: string
                - type: 'null'
              description: >-
                ISO timestamp when this page was last visited (null if never
                visited)
              examples:
                - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
            error:
              type: string
              description: Error message if there was an issue processing this page
              examples:
                - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
            metadata:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
              title: PageMetadata
              description: Extracted metadata from the page (title, description, etc.)
            cleanedHtml:
              type: string
              description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
            extractedLinks:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
              title: ExtractedLinks
              description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
            skippedUrls:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
              title: SkippedLinks
              description: URLs that were skipped during processing with reasons
            children:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksTree'
              title: LinksTree
              description: >-
                Array of child LinksTree nodes, each representing a page found
                under this URL. This creates a recursive tree structure for the
                entire website hierarchy.
              examples:
                - url: https://example.com/about/team
                  name: Team
                  lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                  children: []
                - url: https://example.com/about/history
                  name: History
                  lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                  children:
                    - url: https://example.com/about/history/founding
                      name: Company Founding
                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
          required:
            - url
            - lastUpdated
          title: LinksTree
          description: >-
            Site map tree starting from the root URL (required when tree
            generation is enabled)
          examples:
            - url: https://example.com/about
              rootUrl: https://example.com
              name: About Us
              totalUrls: 150
              lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
              lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
              metadata:
                title: About Us - Example Company
                description: Learn more about our company history and mission.
                language: en
                canonical: https://example.com/about
                robots: index,follow
                author: Example Company
                keywords:
                  - about
                  - company
                  - history
                favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                ogDescription: Learn more about our company history and mission.
                ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
                ogUrl: https://example.com/about
                twitterCard: summary_large_image
                twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
                twitterDescription: Learn more about our company history and mission.
                twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                isIframeAllowed: true
              extractedLinks:
                internal:
                  - https://example.com/about/team
                  - https://example.com/about/history
                  - https://example.com/contact
                external:
                  - https://partner-company.com
                  - https://industry-association.org
                media:
                  images:
                    - https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                    - https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                  videos:
                    - https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                  documents:
                    - https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
              children:
                - url: https://example.com/about/team
                  name: Our Team
                  lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                  children: []
                - url: https://example.com/about/history
                  name: Company History
                  lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                  children:
                    - url: https://example.com/about/history/founding
                      name: Company Founding
                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                      children: []
      required:
        - success
        - targetUrl
        - timestamp
        - requestId
        - cached
        - tree
    LinksSuccessResponseWithoutTree:
      type: object
      properties:
        success:
          const: true
          description: Indicates that the operation was successful
          examples:
            - true
        targetUrl:
          type: string
          description: The URL that was requested to be processed
          examples:
            - https://example.com
        timestamp:
          type: string
          description: ISO timestamp when the request was processed
          examples:
            - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
        requestId:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log entry
          examples:
            - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
        cached:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether the result was returned from cache
          examples:
            - false
        ancestors:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Array of parent URLs leading to this URL
          examples:
            - https://example.com
        metrics:
          type: object
          properties:
            readableDuration:
              type: string
              description: Human-readable representation of the operation duration
              examples:
                - 0.2s
            durationMs:
              type: number
              description: Duration of the operation in milliseconds
              examples:
                - 200
            startTimeMs:
              type: number
              description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation started
              examples:
                - 1704067800000
            endTimeMs:
              type: number
              description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation finished
              examples:
                - 1704067800200
          required:
            - readableDuration
            - durationMs
            - startTimeMs
            - endTimeMs
          title: Metrics
          description: Metrics for the links extraction operation
          examples:
            - readableDuration: 0.2s
              durationMs: 200
              startTimeMs: 1704067800000
              endTimeMs: 1704067800200
        title:
          type: string
          description: The title of the webpage (optional, may be missing for some pages)
          examples:
            - Example Website - Home Page
        description:
          type: string
          description: The meta description of the webpage
          examples:
            - >-
              This is an example website demonstrating web scraping
              capabilities.
        metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
          title: PageMetadata
          description: Extracted metadata from the page (title, description, etc.)
        cleanedHtml:
          type: string
          description: The sanitized version of the HTML with unnecessary elements removed
          examples:
            - <div><h1>Example Website</h1><p>Main content...</p></div>
        metaFiles:
          type: object
          properties:
            robots:
              type: string
              description: Content of the robots.txt file
              examples:
                - |-
                  User-agent: *
                  Allow: /
            sitemapXML:
              type: string
              description: Content of the sitemap.xml file
              examples:
                - >-
                  <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

                  <urlset
                  xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">...</urlset>
          title: MetaFiles
          description: The metadata files like robots.txt and sitemap.xml
        skippedUrls:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
          title: SkippedLinks
          description: URLs that were skipped during processing with reasons
        extractedLinks:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
          title: ExtractedLinks
          description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
      required:
        - success
        - targetUrl
        - timestamp
        - requestId
        - cached
    LinksSuccessResponse:
      anyOf:
        - type: object
          properties:
            success:
              const: true
              description: Indicates that the operation was successful
              examples:
                - true
            targetUrl:
              type: string
              description: The URL that was requested to be processed
              examples:
                - https://example.com
            timestamp:
              type: string
              description: ISO timestamp when the request was processed
              examples:
                - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
            requestId:
              type: string
              description: Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log entry
              examples:
                - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
            cached:
              type: boolean
              description: Whether the result was returned from cache
              examples:
                - false
            ancestors:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
              description: Array of parent URLs leading to this URL
              examples:
                - https://example.com
            metrics:
              type: object
              properties:
                readableDuration:
                  type: string
                  description: Human-readable representation of the operation duration
                  examples:
                    - 0.2s
                durationMs:
                  type: number
                  description: Duration of the operation in milliseconds
                  examples:
                    - 200
                startTimeMs:
                  type: number
                  description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation started
                  examples:
                    - 1704067800000
                endTimeMs:
                  type: number
                  description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation finished
                  examples:
                    - 1704067800200
              required:
                - readableDuration
                - durationMs
                - startTimeMs
                - endTimeMs
              title: Metrics
              description: Metrics for the links extraction operation
              examples:
                - readableDuration: 0.2s
                  durationMs: 200
                  startTimeMs: 1704067800000
                  endTimeMs: 1704067800200
            tree:
              type: object
              properties:
                url:
                  type: string
                  description: The URL of this page
                  examples:
                    - https://example.com/about
                rootUrl:
                  type: string
                  description: The root URL of the website being crawled
                  examples:
                    - https://example.com
                name:
                  type: string
                  description: The display name or title of this page
                  examples:
                    - About Us
                totalUrls:
                  type: number
                  description: Total number of URLs discovered in the entire tree
                  examples:
                    - 150
                lastUpdated:
                  type: string
                  description: ISO timestamp when this page was last crawled
                  examples:
                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                lastVisited:
                  anyOf:
                    - type: string
                    - type: 'null'
                  description: >-
                    ISO timestamp when this page was last visited (null if never
                    visited)
                  examples:
                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                error:
                  type: string
                  description: Error message if there was an issue processing this page
                  examples:
                    - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                metadata:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                  title: PageMetadata
                  description: Extracted metadata from the page (title, description, etc.)
                cleanedHtml:
                  type: string
                  description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                extractedLinks:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                  title: ExtractedLinks
                  description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
                skippedUrls:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                  title: SkippedLinks
                  description: URLs that were skipped during processing with reasons
                children:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksTree'
                  title: LinksTree
                  description: >-
                    Array of child LinksTree nodes, each representing a page
                    found under this URL. This creates a recursive tree
                    structure for the entire website hierarchy.
                  examples:
                    - url: https://example.com/about/team
                      name: Team
                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                      children: []
                    - url: https://example.com/about/history
                      name: History
                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                      children:
                        - url: https://example.com/about/history/founding
                          name: Company Founding
                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
              required:
                - url
                - lastUpdated
              title: LinksTree
              description: >-
                Site map tree starting from the root URL (required when tree
                generation is enabled)
              examples:
                - url: https://example.com/about
                  rootUrl: https://example.com
                  name: About Us
                  totalUrls: 150
                  lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                  lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                  metadata:
                    title: About Us - Example Company
                    description: Learn more about our company history and mission.
                    language: en
                    canonical: https://example.com/about
                    robots: index,follow
                    author: Example Company
                    keywords:
                      - about
                      - company
                      - history
                    favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                    ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                    ogDescription: Learn more about our company history and mission.
                    ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
                    ogUrl: https://example.com/about
                    twitterCard: summary_large_image
                    twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
                    twitterDescription: Learn more about our company history and mission.
                    twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                    isIframeAllowed: true
                  extractedLinks:
                    internal:
                      - https://example.com/about/team
                      - https://example.com/about/history
                      - https://example.com/contact
                    external:
                      - https://partner-company.com
                      - https://industry-association.org
                    media:
                      images:
                        - https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                        - https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                      videos:
                        - https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                      documents:
                        - https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
                  children:
                    - url: https://example.com/about/team
                      name: Our Team
                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                      children: []
                    - url: https://example.com/about/history
                      name: Company History
                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                      children:
                        - url: https://example.com/about/history/founding
                          name: Company Founding
                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                          children: []
          required:
            - success
            - targetUrl
            - timestamp
            - requestId
            - cached
            - tree
        - type: object
          properties:
            success:
              const: true
              description: Indicates that the operation was successful
              examples:
                - true
            targetUrl:
              type: string
              description: The URL that was requested to be processed
              examples:
                - https://example.com
            timestamp:
              type: string
              description: ISO timestamp when the request was processed
              examples:
                - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
            requestId:
              type: string
              description: Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log entry
              examples:
                - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
            cached:
              type: boolean
              description: Whether the result was returned from cache
              examples:
                - false
            ancestors:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
              description: Array of parent URLs leading to this URL
              examples:
                - https://example.com
            metrics:
              type: object
              properties:
                readableDuration:
                  type: string
                  description: Human-readable representation of the operation duration
                  examples:
                    - 0.2s
                durationMs:
                  type: number
                  description: Duration of the operation in milliseconds
                  examples:
                    - 200
                startTimeMs:
                  type: number
                  description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation started
                  examples:
                    - 1704067800000
                endTimeMs:
                  type: number
                  description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation finished
                  examples:
                    - 1704067800200
              required:
                - readableDuration
                - durationMs
                - startTimeMs
                - endTimeMs
              title: Metrics
              description: Metrics for the links extraction operation
              examples:
                - readableDuration: 0.2s
                  durationMs: 200
                  startTimeMs: 1704067800000
                  endTimeMs: 1704067800200
            title:
              type: string
              description: >-
                The title of the webpage (optional, may be missing for some
                pages)
              examples:
                - Example Website - Home Page
            description:
              type: string
              description: The meta description of the webpage
              examples:
                - >-
                  This is an example website demonstrating web scraping
                  capabilities.
            metadata:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
              title: PageMetadata
              description: Extracted metadata from the page (title, description, etc.)
            cleanedHtml:
              type: string
              description: >-
                The sanitized version of the HTML with unnecessary elements
                removed
              examples:
                - <div><h1>Example Website</h1><p>Main content...</p></div>
            metaFiles:
              type: object
              properties:
                robots:
                  type: string
                  description: Content of the robots.txt file
                  examples:
                    - |-
                      User-agent: *
                      Allow: /
                sitemapXML:
                  type: string
                  description: Content of the sitemap.xml file
                  examples:
                    - >-
                      <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

                      <urlset
                      xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">...</urlset>
              title: MetaFiles
              description: The metadata files like robots.txt and sitemap.xml
            skippedUrls:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
              title: SkippedLinks
              description: URLs that were skipped during processing with reasons
            extractedLinks:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
              title: ExtractedLinks
              description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
          required:
            - success
            - targetUrl
            - timestamp
            - requestId
            - cached
      title: LinksSuccessResponse
      description: >-
        Successful response from the links extraction operation. Response
        structure varies based on whether tree generation is enabled.
      examples:
        - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
          success: true
          cached: false
          targetUrl: https://example.com
          timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
          ancestors:
            - https://example.com
          tree:
            url: https://example.com
            rootUrl: https://example.com
            name: Home
            totalUrls: 25
            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
            metadata:
              title: Example Website
              description: Welcome to our example website
            extractedLinks:
              internal:
                - https://example.com/about
                - https://example.com/contact
              external:
                - https://external-site.com/reference
              media:
                images:
                  - https://example.com/logo.png
                videos: []
                documents:
                  - https://example.com/brochure.pdf
            skippedUrls:
              internal:
                - url: https://example.com/admin
                  reason: Blocked by robots.txt
            children:
              - url: https://example.com/about
                name: About
                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:05.000Z'
        - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
          success: true
          cached: false
          targetUrl: https://example.com
          timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
          ancestors:
            - https://example.com
          title: Example Website
          description: Welcome to our example website
          extractedLinks:
            internal:
              - https://example.com/about
              - https://example.com/contact
            external:
              - https://external-site.com/reference
            media:
              images:
                - https://example.com/logo.png
              videos: []
              documents:
                - https://example.com/brochure.pdf
          skippedUrls:
            internal:
              - url: https://example.com/admin
                reason: Blocked by robots.txt
    LinksErrorResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        requestId:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log entry
          examples:
            - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
        success:
          const: false
          description: Indicates that the operation failed
          examples:
            - false
        requestUrl:
          type: string
          description: >-
            The URL, raw url, that was requested to be processed and might be
            different from the target url
          examples:
            - https://example.com/article#fragment
        targetUrl:
          type: string
          description: The URL that was being processed when the error occurred
          examples:
            - https://example.com/article
        timestamp:
          type: string
          description: ISO timestamp when the error occurred
          examples:
            - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
        error:
          type: string
          description: Error message describing what went wrong
          examples:
            - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
        tree:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksTree'
          title: LinksTree
          description: >-
            LinksTree - Partial site map tree if available, or undefined if no
            tree could be generated
      required:
        - requestId
        - success
        - targetUrl
        - timestamp
        - error
      title: LinksErrorResponse
      description: Error response from the links extraction operation
      examples:
        - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
          success: false
          requestUrl: https://example.com/article#fragment
          targetUrl: https://example.com
          timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
          error: 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
    LinksTree:
      type: object
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          description: The URL of this page
          examples:
            - https://example.com/about
        rootUrl:
          type: string
          description: The root URL of the website being crawled
          examples:
            - https://example.com
        name:
          type: string
          description: The display name or title of this page
          examples:
            - About Us
        totalUrls:
          type: number
          description: Total number of URLs discovered in the entire tree
          examples:
            - 150
        lastUpdated:
          type: string
          description: ISO timestamp when this page was last crawled
          examples:
            - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
        lastVisited:
          anyOf:
            - type: string
            - type: 'null'
          description: >-
            ISO timestamp when this page was last visited (null if never
            visited)
          examples:
            - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
        error:
          type: string
          description: Error message if there was an issue processing this page
          examples:
            - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
        metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
          title: PageMetadata
          description: Extracted metadata from the page (title, description, etc.)
        cleanedHtml:
          type: string
          description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
        extractedLinks:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
          title: ExtractedLinks
          description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
        skippedUrls:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
          title: SkippedLinks
          description: URLs that were skipped during processing with reasons
        children:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksTree'
          title: LinksTree
          description: >-
            Array of child LinksTree nodes, each representing a page found under
            this URL. This creates a recursive tree structure for the entire
            website hierarchy.
          examples:
            - url: https://example.com/about/team
              name: Team
              lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
              children: []
            - url: https://example.com/about/history
              name: History
              lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
              children:
                - url: https://example.com/about/history/founding
                  name: Company Founding
                  lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
      required:
        - url
        - lastUpdated
      title: LinksTree
      description: A node in the site map tree representing a webpage and its children
      examples:
        - url: https://example.com/about
          rootUrl: https://example.com
          name: About Us
          totalUrls: 150
          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
          lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
          metadata:
            title: About Us - Example Company
            description: Learn more about our company history and mission.
            language: en
            canonical: https://example.com/about
            robots: index,follow
            author: Example Company
            keywords:
              - about
              - company
              - history
            favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
            ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
            ogDescription: Learn more about our company history and mission.
            ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
            ogUrl: https://example.com/about
            twitterCard: summary_large_image
            twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
            twitterDescription: Learn more about our company history and mission.
            twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
            isIframeAllowed: true
          extractedLinks:
            internal:
              - https://example.com/about/team
              - https://example.com/about/history
              - https://example.com/contact
            external:
              - https://partner-company.com
              - https://industry-association.org
            media:
              images:
                - https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                - https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
              videos:
                - https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
              documents:
                - https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
          children:
            - url: https://example.com/about/team
              name: Our Team
              lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
              children: []
            - url: https://example.com/about/history
              name: Company History
              lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
              children:
                - url: https://example.com/about/history/founding
                  name: Company Founding
                  lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                  children: []
    LinkExtractionOptions:
      type: object
      properties:
        includeExternal:
          type: boolean
          default: false
          description: 'Whether to include links from other domains. Default: false'
          examples:
            - false
            - true
        includeMedia:
          type: boolean
          default: false
          description: >-
            Whether to include media files (images, videos, docs). Default:
            false
          examples:
            - false
            - true
        excludePatterns:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Array of regex patterns to exclude URLs
          examples:
            - - ^/admin/
              - \.pdf$
              - /private/
        removeQueryParams:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: 'Whether to remove query parameters from URLs. Default: true'
          examples:
            - true
            - false
      default:
        includeExternal: false
        includeMedia: false
        removeQueryParams: true
      title: LinkExtractionOptions
      description: Schema for configuring link extraction behavior
      examples:
        - excludePatterns:
            - ^/admin/
            - \.pdf$
            - /private/
          includeExternal: false
          includeMedia: false
          removeQueryParams: true
    MetadataOptions:
      type: object
      properties:
        title:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract page title from title tag or meta title
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        description:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract meta description content
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        language:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract page language from html lang attribute
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        canonical:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract canonical URL from link rel="canonical"
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        robots:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract robots directives from meta robots
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        author:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract author information from meta author
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        keywords:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract meta keywords and convert to array
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        favicon:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract favicon URL from link rel="icon" or similar
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        openGraph:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract Open Graph metadata (og:* properties)
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        twitter:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Extract Twitter Card metadata (twitter:* properties)
          examples:
            - true
            - false
      default:
        title: true
        description: true
        language: true
        canonical: true
        robots: true
        author: true
        keywords: true
        favicon: true
        openGraph: true
        twitter: true
      title: MetadataOptions
      description: Schema for configuring metadata extraction options
      examples:
        - title: true
          description: true
          language: true
          canonical: true
          robots: true
          author: true
          keywords: true
          favicon: true
          openGraph: true
          twitter: true
    ReaderCleaningOptions:
      type: object
      properties:
        cheerioOptions:
          type: object
          properties:
            baseURI:
              type: string
              description: >-
                The base URI for the document. Used to resolve href and src
                props.
              examples:
                - https://example.com
            onParseError:
              anyOf:
                - type: 'null'
                - {}
              description: Callback for parse errors.
              examples:
                - null
            pseudos:
              type: object
              propertyNames:
                type: string
              additionalProperties:
                anyOf:
                  - type: string
                  - {}
              description: >-
                Extension point for pseudo-classes. Maps from names to either
                strings or functions.
              examples:
                - foo: div.foo
            quirksMode:
              type: boolean
              description: >-
                Is the document in quirks mode? This will lead to .className and
                #id being case-insensitive.
              examples:
                - false
            scriptingEnabled:
              type: boolean
              description: >-
                The scripting flag. If set to true, noscript element content
                will be parsed as text.
              examples:
                - true
            sourceCodeLocationInfo:
              type: boolean
              description: >-
                Enables source code location information. When enabled, each
                node will have a sourceCodeLocation property.
              examples:
                - false
            treeAdapter:
              description: Specifies the resulting tree format.
            xml:
              anyOf:
                - type: boolean
                - type: object
                  propertyNames:
                    type: string
                  additionalProperties: {}
              description: >-
                Recommended way of configuring htmlparser2 when wanting to parse
                XML.
              examples:
                - false
                - true
          title: CheerioOptions
          description: >-
            Configuration options for Cheerio. Parser-specific options are only
            recognized if the relevant parser is used.
          examples:
            - baseURI: https://example.com
              quirksMode: false
              scriptingEnabled: true
            - xml: true
              sourceCodeLocationInfo: true
              pseudos:
                foo: div.foo
          default: {}
        readerOptions:
          type: object
          properties:
            debug:
              type: boolean
              description: Whether to enable logging.
              examples:
                - false
            maxElemsToParse:
              type: number
              description: The maximum number of elements to parse. 0 means no limit.
              examples:
                - 0
                - 1000
            nbTopCandidates:
              type: number
              description: >-
                The number of top candidates to consider when analysing
                competition among candidates.
              examples:
                - 5
                - 10
            charThreshold:
              type: number
              description: >-
                The minimum number of characters an article must have to return
                a result.
              examples:
                - 500
                - 300
                - 1000
            keepClasses:
              type: boolean
              description: >-
                Whether to preserve all classes on HTML elements. When false,
                only classesToPreserve are kept.
              examples:
                - false
                - true
            classesToPreserve:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
              description: Classes to preserve on HTML elements when keepClasses is false.
              examples:
                - - article
                  - content
                - - post-body
                  - main-content
            disableJSONLD:
              type: boolean
              description: Whether to skip JSON-LD parsing when extracting page metadata.
              examples:
                - false
                - true
            allowedVideoRegex:
              not: {}
              description: Regular expression for video URLs allowed in article content.
            linkDensityModifier:
              type: number
              description: >-
                Number added to base link density threshold during shadiness
                checks.
              examples:
                - 0
                - -0.1
                - 0.2
            extraction:
              type: boolean
              description: >-
                Whether to perform full extraction. When false,
                content/textContent/length/excerpt will be null.
              examples:
                - true
                - false
            baseURI:
              type: string
              description: Base URI for resolving relative URLs.
              examples:
                - https://example.com
                - https://blog.example.com/posts/
          title: ReaderOptions
          description: >-
            Configuration options for the Readability library. All options are
            optional.
          examples:
            - debug: false
              maxElemsToParse: 0
              nbTopCandidates: 5
              charThreshold: 500
              keepClasses: false
              extraction: true
            - charThreshold: 300
              keepClasses: true
              extraction: false
              baseURI: https://example.com
          default: {}
      default:
        cheerioOptions: {}
        readerOptions: {}
      description: Options for HTML cleaning with cheerio-reader.
      examples:
        - cheerioOptions: {}
          readerOptions: {}
    HTMLRewriterOptions:
      type: object
      properties:
        allowedHTMLTags:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: If allowedHTMLTags is specified, remove everything not in the list
          examples:
            - p
            - h1
            - h2
            - h3
            - ul
            - ol
            - li
            - a
            - strong
            - em
        disallowedHTMLTags:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: If disallowedHTMLTags is specified, remove matching tags
          examples:
            - script
            - style
            - iframe
            - form
            - button
        extractMainContent:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: >-
            Whether to extract only the main content area, removing navigation,
            footers, etc. Default: true
          examples:
            - true
        removeBase64Images:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: >-
            Whether to remove base64 encoded images to reduce payload size.
            Default: true
          examples:
            - true
      default:
        extractMainContent: true
        removeBase64Images: true
      title: HTMLRewriterOptions
      description: Schema for HTML rewriter cleaning configuration options
      examples:
        - allowedHTMLTags:
            - p
            - h1
            - h2
            - h3
            - ul
            - ol
            - li
            - a
            - strong
            - em
          disallowedHTMLTags:
            - script
            - style
            - iframe
            - form
            - button
          extractMainContent: true
          removeBase64Images: true
    FetchOptions:
      type: object
      properties:
        method:
          enum:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          description: HTTP request method (only GET and HEAD allowed for scraping)
          examples:
            - GET
            - HEAD
        headers:
          type: object
          properties:
            User-Agent:
              type: string
            Accept:
              type: string
            Accept-Language:
              type: string
            Accept-Encoding:
              type: string
            Referer:
              type: string
            Cookie:
              type: string
            DNT:
              type: string
            Upgrade-Insecure-Requests:
              type: string
            Cache-Control:
              type: string
            Pragma:
              type: string
            If-Modified-Since:
              type: string
            If-None-Match:
              type: string
            Priority:
              type: string
            Sec-CH-UA:
              type: string
            Sec-CH-UA-Mobile:
              type: string
            Sec-CH-UA-Platform:
              type: string
            Sec-Fetch-Site:
              type: string
            Sec-Fetch-Mode:
              type: string
            Sec-Fetch-Dest:
              type: string
            Sec-Fetch-User:
              type: string
          description: HTTP headers for the request (filtered for security)
        redirect:
          enum:
            - follow
            - error
            - manual
          description: How to handle redirects
          examples:
            - follow
            - error
            - manual
        signal:
          anyOf:
            - not: {}
            - type: 'null'
          description: Signal for aborting the request (useful for timeouts)
      default: {}
      title: FetchOptions
      description: Safe fetch options for web scraping operations
      examples:
        - method: GET
          headers:
            User-Agent: >-
              Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36
              (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/121.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
            Accept: >-
              text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7
            Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9
            Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br
            DNT: '1'
            Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: '1'
            Sec-CH-UA: '"Not_A Brand";v="8", "Chromium";v="120", "Google Chrome";v="120"'
            Sec-CH-UA-Mobile: '?0'
            Sec-CH-UA-Platform: '"Windows"'
            Sec-Fetch-Site: none
            Sec-Fetch-Mode: navigate
            Sec-Fetch-User: '?1'
            Sec-Fetch-Dest: document
            Priority: u=0, i
          redirect: follow
        - method: HEAD
          headers:
            User-Agent: Deepcrawl-Bot/1.0 (+https://deepcrawl.dev)
            Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
            Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
          redirect: manual
    CacheOptions:
      type: object
      properties:
        enabled:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Whether to enable cache. Default is true.
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        expirationTtl:
          type: number
          minimum: 60
          default: 172800
          description: >-
            The number that represents when to expire the key-value pair in
            seconds from now. The minimum value is 60
          examples:
            - 60
      default:
        enabled: true
        expirationTtl: 172800
    ScrapeOptions:
      type: object
      properties:
        metadata:
          type: boolean
          default: true
          description: Whether to extract metadata from the page.
          examples:
            - true
            - false
        cleanedHtml:
          type: boolean
          default: false
          description: Whether to return cleaned HTML.
          examples:
            - false
            - true
        robots:
          type: boolean
          default: false
          description: Whether to fetch and parse robots.txt.
          examples:
            - false
            - true
        sitemapXML:
          type: boolean
          default: false
          description: >-
            ( NOTE: sitemapXML is not stable yet, please use with caution. It
            may not work as expected. ) Whether to fetch and parse sitemap.xml.
          examples:
            - false
            - true
        metadataOptions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/MetadataOptions'
          description: Options for metadata extraction.
          examples:
            - title: true
              description: true
              language: true
              canonical: true
              robots: true
              author: true
              keywords: true
              favicon: true
              openGraph: true
              twitter: true
        cleaningProcessor:
          enum:
            - cheerio-reader
            - html-rewriter
          default: cheerio-reader
          description: The cleaning processor to use.
          examples:
            - cheerio-reader
            - html-rewriter
        htmlRewriterOptions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/HTMLRewriterOptions'
          description: Options for HTML cleaning with html-rewriter.
          examples:
            - extractMainContent: true
              removeBase64Images: true
        readerCleaningOptions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReaderCleaningOptions'
          description: Options for HTML cleaning with cheerio-reader.
          examples:
            - readerOptions:
                debug: true
        fetchOptions:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/FetchOptions'
          description: Options for the fetch request.
          examples:
            - method: GET
              headers:
                User-Agent: Deepcrawl-Bot/1.0 (+https://deepcrawl.dev)
                Accept: >-
                  text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
                Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
              redirect: follow
      title: ScrapeOptions
      description: Configuration options for scraping operation
      examples:
        - metadata: true
          cleanedHtml: false
          robots: false
          sitemapXML: false
          metadataOptions:
            title: true
          cleaningProcessor: cheerio-reader
          readerCleaningOptions:
            readerOptions:
              debug: true
          cheerioOptions:
            baseURI: https://example.com
            quirksMode: false
            scriptingEnabled: true
            sourceCodeLocationInfo: false
            treeAdapter: treeAdapters.default
            xml: false
    ScrapedData:
      type: object
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          description: The title of the webpage (optional, may be missing for some pages)
          examples:
            - Example Website - Home Page
        rawHtml:
          type: string
          description: The original unmodified HTML content of the webpage
          examples:
            - >-
              <html><head><title>Example Website - Home
              Page</title></head><body>...</body></html>
        description:
          type: string
          description: The meta description of the webpage
          examples:
            - >-
              This is an example website demonstrating web scraping
              capabilities.
        metadata:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
          title: PageMetadata
          description: Extracted metadata from the page (title, description, etc.)
        cleanedHtml:
          type: string
          description: The sanitized version of the HTML with unnecessary elements removed
          examples:
            - <div><h1>Example Website</h1><p>Main content...</p></div>
        metaFiles:
          type: object
          properties:
            robots:
              type: string
              description: Content of the robots.txt file
              examples:
                - |-
                  User-agent: *
                  Allow: /
            sitemapXML:
              type: string
              description: Content of the sitemap.xml file
              examples:
                - >-
                  <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

                  <urlset
                  xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">...</urlset>
          title: MetaFiles
          description: The metadata files like robots.txt and sitemap.xml
      required:
        - rawHtml
      title: ScrapedData
      description: Schema for scraped data from a webpage
      examples:
        - title: Example Website - Home Page
          rawHtml: >-
            <html><head><title>Example Website - Home
            Page</title></head><body>...</body></html>
          description: This is an example website demonstrating web scraping capabilities.
          metadata:
            title: Example Website - Home Page
            description: >-
              This is an example website demonstrating web scraping
              capabilities.
            ogTitle: Example Website
          cleanedHtml: <div><h1>Example Website</h1><p>Main content...</p></div>
          metaFiles:
            robots: |-
              User-agent: *
              Disallow: /admin/
            sitemapXML: <?xml version="1.0"?><urlset>...</urlset>
    PageMetadata:
      type: object
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          description: Page title from title tag or meta title
          examples:
            - Example Website - Home Page
        description:
          type: string
          description: Page description from meta description
          examples:
            - This is an example website demonstrating metadata extraction.
        language:
          type: string
          description: Page language from html lang attribute
          examples:
            - en
        canonical:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: Canonical URL from link rel="canonical"
          examples:
            - https://example.com/
        robots:
          type: string
          description: Robots directives from meta robots
          examples:
            - index, follow
        author:
          type: string
          description: Author information from meta author
          examples:
            - John Doe
        keywords:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Keywords array from meta keywords
          examples:
            - example
            - metadata
            - extraction
        lastModified:
          anyOf:
            - type: string
            - type: 'null'
          description: Last modified date from HTTP headers
          examples:
            - '2023-04-15T14:32:21Z'
        favicon:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: Favicon URL from link rel="icon" or similar
          examples:
            - https://example.com/favicon.ico
        ogTitle:
          type: string
          description: OpenGraph title from meta property="og:title"
          examples:
            - Example Website
        ogDescription:
          type: string
          description: OpenGraph description from meta property="og:description"
          examples:
            - Learn about our services
        ogImage:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: OpenGraph image URL from meta property="og:image"
          examples:
            - https://example.com/images/og-image.jpg
        ogUrl:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: OpenGraph URL from meta property="og:url"
          examples:
            - https://example.com/
        ogType:
          type: string
          description: OpenGraph type from meta property="og:type"
          examples:
            - website
        ogSiteName:
          type: string
          description: OpenGraph site name from meta property="og:site_name"
          examples:
            - Example Website
        twitterCard:
          type: string
          description: Twitter card type from meta name="twitter:card"
          examples:
            - summary_large_image
        twitterSite:
          type: string
          description: Twitter site username from meta name="twitter:site"
          examples:
            - '@examplesite'
        twitterCreator:
          type: string
          description: Twitter creator username from meta name="twitter:creator"
          examples:
            - '@johndoe'
        twitterTitle:
          type: string
          description: Twitter title from meta name="twitter:title"
          examples:
            - Example Website - Official Site
        twitterDescription:
          type: string
          description: Twitter description from meta name="twitter:description"
          examples:
            - The best example website on the internet
        twitterImage:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: Twitter image URL from meta name="twitter:image"
          examples:
            - https://example.com/images/twitter-card.jpg
        isIframeAllowed:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether iframe embedding is allowed
          examples:
            - true
      title: PageMetadata
      description: Schema for page metadata extracted from a webpage
      examples:
        - title: Example Website - Home Page
          description: This is an example website demonstrating metadata extraction.
          language: en
          canonical: https://example.com/
          robots: index, follow
          author: John Doe
          keywords:
            - example
            - metadata
            - extraction
          lastModified: '2023-04-15T14:32:21Z'
          favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
          ogTitle: Example Website
          ogDescription: Learn about our services
          ogImage: https://example.com/images/og-image.jpg
          ogUrl: https://example.com/
          ogType: website
          ogSiteName: Example Website
          twitterCard: summary_large_image
          twitterSite: '@examplesite'
          twitterCreator: '@johndoe'
          twitterTitle: Example Website - Official Site
          twitterDescription: The best example website on the internet
          twitterImage: https://example.com/images/twitter-card.jpg
          isIframeAllowed: true
    ExtractedLinks:
      type: object
      properties:
        internal:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Array of internal links from the same domain
          examples:
            - https://example.com/about
            - https://example.com/contact
            - https://example.com/services
        external:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Array of external links from other domains
          examples:
            - https://github.com/example/repo
            - https://twitter.com/example
            - https://linkedin.com/company/example
        media:
          type: object
          properties:
            images:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
              description: Array of image file URLs
              examples:
                - https://example.com/images/logo.png
                - https://example.com/images/banner.jpg
            videos:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
              description: Array of video file URLs
              examples:
                - https://example.com/videos/intro.mp4
                - https://example.com/videos/demo.webm
            documents:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
              description: Array of document file URLs
              examples:
                - https://example.com/docs/whitepaper.pdf
                - https://example.com/docs/manual.docx
          description: Media files categorized by type
      title: ExtractedLinks
      description: Schema for storing extracted links by category
      examples:
        - internal:
            - https://example.com/about
            - https://example.com/contact
            - https://example.com/services
          external:
            - https://github.com/example/repo
            - https://twitter.com/example
            - https://linkedin.com/company/example
          media:
            images:
              - https://example.com/images/logo.png
              - https://example.com/images/banner.jpg
            videos:
              - https://example.com/videos/intro.mp4
              - https://example.com/videos/demo.webm
            documents:
              - https://example.com/docs/whitepaper.pdf
              - https://example.com/docs/manual.docx
    SkippedLinks:
      type: object
      properties:
        internal:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedUrl'
          description: Internal URLs that were skipped during processing
          examples:
            - url: https://example.com/admin
              reason: Blocked by robots.txt
        external:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedUrl'
          description: External URLs that were skipped during processing
          examples:
            - url: https://external-site.com/blocked
              reason: External domain excluded
        media:
          type: object
          properties:
            images:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedUrl'
              description: Image URLs that were skipped during processing
              examples:
                - url: https://example.com/large-image.jpg
                  reason: File size exceeds limit
            videos:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedUrl'
              description: Video URLs that were skipped during processing
              examples:
                - url: https://example.com/video.mp4
                  reason: Media extraction disabled
            documents:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedUrl'
              description: Document URLs that were skipped during processing
              examples:
                - url: https://example.com/document.pdf
                  reason: PDF processing disabled
          description: Media URLs that were skipped during processing
        other:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedUrl'
          description: Other URLs that were skipped during processing
          examples:
            - url: mailto:contact@example.com
              reason: Non-HTTP protocol
      title: SkippedLinks
      description: Categorized collection of URLs that were skipped during processing
      examples:
        - internal:
            - url: https://example.com/admin
              reason: Blocked by robots.txt
            - url: https://example.com/private
              reason: Requires authentication
          external:
            - url: https://external-site.com/blocked
              reason: External domain excluded
          media:
            images:
              - url: https://example.com/large-image.jpg
                reason: File size exceeds limit
            videos:
              - url: https://example.com/video.mp4
                reason: Media extraction disabled
            documents:
              - url: https://example.com/document.pdf
                reason: PDF processing disabled
          other:
            - url: mailto:contact@example.com
              reason: Non-HTTP protocol
    SkippedUrl:
      type: object
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          description: The URL that was skipped during processing
          examples:
            - https://example.com/private-page
        reason:
          type: string
          description: The reason why this URL was skipped
          examples:
            - Blocked by robots.txt
      required:
        - url
        - reason
      title: SkippedUrl
      description: A URL that was skipped during processing with the reason
      examples:
        - url: https://example.com/private-page
          reason: Blocked by robots.txt
    VisitedUrl:
      type: object
      properties:
        url:
          type: string
          description: The URL that was visited
          examples:
            - https://example.com/about
        lastVisited:
          anyOf:
            - type: string
            - type: 'null'
          description: ISO timestamp when this URL was last visited
          examples:
            - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
      required:
        - url
      title: VisitedUrl
      description: A URL that has been visited with timestamp information
    UndefinedError:
      type: object
      properties:
        defined:
          const: false
        code:
          type: string
        status:
          type: number
        message:
          type: string
        data: {}
      required:
        - defined
        - code
        - status
        - message
    GetOneLogOptions:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log entry
      required:
        - id
    GetOneLogResponse:
      anyOf:
        - type: object
          properties:
            id:
              type: string
              description: Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log entry
            path:
              const: read-getMarkdown
            success:
              type: boolean
            requestOptions:
              type: object
              properties:
                url:
                  type: string
                  description: The URL to read and extract content from
                  examples:
                    - https://example.com
                    - example.com
                cacheOptions:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
                  description: >-
                    Cache configuration for read operation based on KV put
                    options except for `metadata`
                  examples:
                    - enabled: true
                      expirationTtl: 172800
                cleaningProcessor:
                  enum:
                    - cheerio-reader
                    - html-rewriter
                  default: cheerio-reader
                  description: The cleaning processor to use.
                  examples:
                    - cheerio-reader
                    - html-rewriter
                markdownConverterOptions:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    preferNativeParser:
                      type: boolean
                      default: false
                      title: Prefer Native Parser
                      description: >-
                        Use native window DOMParser when available instead of
                        fallback parser (default: false)
                      examples:
                        - false
                        - true
                    codeFence:
                      type: string
                      default: '```'
                      title: Code Fence
                      description: 'Characters used to wrap code blocks (default: "```")'
                      examples:
                        - '```'
                        - ~~~
                    bulletMarker:
                      type: string
                      default: '*'
                      title: Bullet Marker
                      description: Character used for unordered list items
                      examples:
                        - '*'
                        - '-'
                        - +
                    codeBlockStyle:
                      enum:
                        - indented
                        - fenced
                      default: fenced
                      title: Code Block Style
                      description: >-
                        How to format code blocks - either indented (4 spaces)
                        or fenced (with code fence characters)
                      examples:
                        - fenced
                        - indented
                    emDelimiter:
                      type: string
                      default: _
                      title: Emphasis Delimiter
                      description: >-
                        Characters used to wrap emphasized (italic) text
                        (default: _)
                      examples:
                        - _
                        - '*'
                    strongDelimiter:
                      type: string
                      default: '**'
                      title: Strong Delimiter
                      description: 'Characters used to wrap strong (bold) text (default: **)'
                      examples:
                        - '**'
                        - __
                    strikeDelimiter:
                      type: string
                      default: ~~
                      title: Strike Delimiter
                      description: 'Characters used to wrap strikethrough text (default: ~~)'
                      examples:
                        - ~~
                    ignore:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      title: Ignore Elements
                      description: >-
                        HTML elements to completely ignore (including their
                        content) during conversion
                      examples:
                        - - script
                          - style
                        - - nav
                          - footer
                    blockElements:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      title: Block Elements
                      description: >-
                        HTML elements to treat as block elements (surrounded
                        with blank lines)
                      examples:
                        - - div
                          - section
                        - - article
                          - aside
                    maxConsecutiveNewlines:
                      type: integer
                      minimum: -9007199254740991
                      maximum: 9007199254740991
                      exclusiveMinimum: 0
                      default: 3
                      title: Max Consecutive Newlines
                      description: >-
                        Maximum number of consecutive newlines to preserve in
                        output
                      examples:
                        - 3
                        - 2
                        - 1
                    lineStartEscape:
                      type: array
                      prefixItems:
                        - not: {}
                        - type: string
                      title: Line Start Escape
                      description: >-
                        Pattern and replacement for escaping special characters
                        at line start
                      examples:
                        - - /^(\d+\.)/
                          - \$1
                    globalEscape:
                      type: array
                      prefixItems:
                        - not: {}
                        - type: string
                      title: Global Escape
                      description: >-
                        Pattern and replacement for escaping special characters
                        globally
                      examples:
                        - - /([*_`])/g
                          - \$1
                    textReplace:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: array
                        prefixItems:
                          - not: {}
                          - type: string
                      title: Text Replace
                      description: >-
                        Array of pattern-replacement pairs for custom text
                        transformations
                      examples:
                        - - - /\s+/g
                            - ' '
                        - - - /&nbsp;/g
                            - ' '
                          - - /&amp;/g
                            - '&'
                    keepDataImages:
                      type: boolean
                      default: false
                      title: Keep Data Images
                      description: >-
                        Whether to preserve images with data: URIs (can be up to
                        1MB each) (default: false)
                      examples:
                        - false
                        - true
                    useLinkReferenceDefinitions:
                      type: boolean
                      default: false
                      title: Use Link Reference Definitions
                      description: >-
                        Format links using reference definitions at bottom
                        instead of inline (default: false)
                      examples:
                        - false
