                        - true
                    useInlineLinks:
                      type: boolean
                      default: true
                      title: Use Inline Links
                      description: >-
                        Wrap URL text in <> instead of []() syntax when text
                        matches URL (default: true)
                      examples:
                        - true
                        - false
                  default:
                    preferNativeParser: false
                    codeFence: '```'
                    bulletMarker: '*'
                    codeBlockStyle: fenced
                    emDelimiter: _
                    strongDelimiter: '**'
                    strikeDelimiter: ~~
                    maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                    keepDataImages: false
                    useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                    useInlineLinks: true
                  title: MarkdownConverterOptions
                  description: Options for markdown conversion.
                  examples:
                    - preferNativeParser: false
                      codeFence: '```'
                      bulletMarker: '*'
                      codeBlockStyle: fenced
                      emDelimiter: _
                      strongDelimiter: '**'
                      strikeDelimiter: ~~
                      maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                      keepDataImages: false
                      useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                      useInlineLinks: true
              required:
                - url
            response:
              anyOf:
                - type: string
                - $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadErrorResponse'
            requestTimestamp:
              type: string
              description: Request timestamp for getMarkdown
              examples:
                - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
          required:
            - id
            - path
            - success
            - requestOptions
            - requestTimestamp
        - type: object
          properties:
            id:
              type: string
              description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
            path:
              const: read-readUrl
            success:
              type: boolean
            requestOptions:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadOptions'
            response:
              anyOf:
                - $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadSuccessResponse'
                - $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadErrorResponse'
            error:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadErrorResponse'
            requestTimestamp:
              type: string
              description: Request timestamp for readUrl
              examples:
                - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
          required:
            - id
            - path
            - success
            - requestOptions
            - requestTimestamp
        - type: object
          properties:
            id:
              type: string
              description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
            path:
              const: links-getLinks
            success:
              type: boolean
            requestOptions:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksOptions'
            response:
              anyOf:
                - $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksSuccessResponse'
                - $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksErrorResponse'
            error:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksErrorResponse'
            requestTimestamp:
              type: string
              description: Request timestamp for getLinks
              examples:
                - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
          required:
            - id
            - path
            - success
            - requestOptions
            - requestTimestamp
        - type: object
          properties:
            id:
              type: string
              description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
            path:
              const: links-extractLinks
            success:
              type: boolean
            requestOptions:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksOptions'
            response:
              anyOf:
                - $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksSuccessResponse'
                - $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksErrorResponse'
            error:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksErrorResponse'
            requestTimestamp:
              type: string
              description: Request timestamp for extractLinks
              examples:
                - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
          required:
            - id
            - path
            - success
            - requestOptions
            - requestTimestamp
      description: Activity log entry with the response
    ListLogsOptions:
      type: object
      properties:
        limit:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
          maximum: 100
          default: 5
          description: Maximum number of logs to return
        offset:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 9007199254740991
          default: 0
          description: Number of logs to skip for pagination
        path:
          type: string
          description: >-
            Filter by endpoint path (e.g., "read-getMarkdown",
            "links-extractLinks")
        success:
          type: boolean
          description: Filter by success status
        startDate:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Filter logs from this date (ISO 8601)
        endDate:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Filter logs until this date (ISO 8601)
        orderBy:
          enum:
            - requestTimestamp
            - path
            - requestUrl
            - success
            - id
          description: Column to sort by. Defaults to requestTimestamp when omitted.
        orderDir:
          enum:
            - asc
            - desc
          description: Sort direction. Defaults to desc when omitted.
    ListLogsResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        logs:
          type: array
          items:
            anyOf:
              - type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log entry
                  path:
                    const: read-getMarkdown
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  requestOptions:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      url:
                        type: string
                        description: The URL to read and extract content from
                        examples:
                          - https://example.com
                          - example.com
                      cacheOptions:
                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
                        description: >-
                          Cache configuration for read operation based on KV put
                          options except for `metadata`
                        examples:
                          - enabled: true
                            expirationTtl: 172800
                      cleaningProcessor:
                        enum:
                          - cheerio-reader
                          - html-rewriter
                        default: cheerio-reader
                        description: The cleaning processor to use.
                        examples:
                          - cheerio-reader
                          - html-rewriter
                      markdownConverterOptions:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          preferNativeParser:
                            type: boolean
                            default: false
                            title: Prefer Native Parser
                            description: >-
                              Use native window DOMParser when available instead
                              of fallback parser (default: false)
                            examples:
                              - false
                              - true
                          codeFence:
                            type: string
                            default: '```'
                            title: Code Fence
                            description: >-
                              Characters used to wrap code blocks (default:
                              "```")
                            examples:
                              - '```'
                              - ~~~
                          bulletMarker:
                            type: string
                            default: '*'
                            title: Bullet Marker
                            description: Character used for unordered list items
                            examples:
                              - '*'
                              - '-'
                              - +
                          codeBlockStyle:
                            enum:
                              - indented
                              - fenced
                            default: fenced
                            title: Code Block Style
                            description: >-
                              How to format code blocks - either indented (4
                              spaces) or fenced (with code fence characters)
                            examples:
                              - fenced
                              - indented
                          emDelimiter:
                            type: string
                            default: _
                            title: Emphasis Delimiter
                            description: >-
                              Characters used to wrap emphasized (italic) text
                              (default: _)
                            examples:
                              - _
                              - '*'
                          strongDelimiter:
                            type: string
                            default: '**'
                            title: Strong Delimiter
                            description: >-
                              Characters used to wrap strong (bold) text
                              (default: **)
                            examples:
                              - '**'
                              - __
                          strikeDelimiter:
                            type: string
                            default: ~~
                            title: Strike Delimiter
                            description: >-
                              Characters used to wrap strikethrough text
                              (default: ~~)
                            examples:
                              - ~~
                          ignore:
                            type: array
                            items:
                              type: string
                            title: Ignore Elements
                            description: >-
                              HTML elements to completely ignore (including
                              their content) during conversion
                            examples:
                              - - script
                                - style
                              - - nav
                                - footer
                          blockElements:
                            type: array
                            items:
                              type: string
                            title: Block Elements
                            description: >-
                              HTML elements to treat as block elements
                              (surrounded with blank lines)
                            examples:
                              - - div
                                - section
                              - - article
                                - aside
                          maxConsecutiveNewlines:
                            type: integer
                            minimum: -9007199254740991
                            maximum: 9007199254740991
                            exclusiveMinimum: 0
                            default: 3
                            title: Max Consecutive Newlines
                            description: >-
                              Maximum number of consecutive newlines to preserve
                              in output
                            examples:
                              - 3
                              - 2
                              - 1
                          lineStartEscape:
                            type: array
                            prefixItems:
                              - not: {}
                              - type: string
                            title: Line Start Escape
                            description: >-
                              Pattern and replacement for escaping special
                              characters at line start
                            examples:
                              - - /^(\d+\.)/
                                - \$1
                          globalEscape:
                            type: array
                            prefixItems:
                              - not: {}
                              - type: string
                            title: Global Escape
                            description: >-
                              Pattern and replacement for escaping special
                              characters globally
                            examples:
                              - - /([*_`])/g
                                - \$1
                          textReplace:
                            type: array
                            items:
                              type: array
                              prefixItems:
                                - not: {}
                                - type: string
                            title: Text Replace
                            description: >-
                              Array of pattern-replacement pairs for custom text
                              transformations
                            examples:
                              - - - /\s+/g
                                  - ' '
                              - - - /&nbsp;/g
                                  - ' '
                                - - /&amp;/g
                                  - '&'
                          keepDataImages:
                            type: boolean
                            default: false
                            title: Keep Data Images
                            description: >-
                              Whether to preserve images with data: URIs (can be
                              up to 1MB each) (default: false)
                            examples:
                              - false
                              - true
                          useLinkReferenceDefinitions:
                            type: boolean
                            default: false
                            title: Use Link Reference Definitions
                            description: >-
                              Format links using reference definitions at bottom
                              instead of inline (default: false)
                            examples:
                              - false
                              - true
                          useInlineLinks:
                            type: boolean
                            default: true
                            title: Use Inline Links
                            description: >-
                              Wrap URL text in <> instead of []() syntax when
                              text matches URL (default: true)
                            examples:
                              - true
                              - false
                        default:
                          preferNativeParser: false
                          codeFence: '```'
                          bulletMarker: '*'
                          codeBlockStyle: fenced
                          emDelimiter: _
                          strongDelimiter: '**'
                          strikeDelimiter: ~~
                          maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                          keepDataImages: false
                          useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                          useInlineLinks: true
                        title: MarkdownConverterOptions
                        description: Options for markdown conversion.
                        examples:
                          - preferNativeParser: false
                            codeFence: '```'
                            bulletMarker: '*'
                            codeBlockStyle: fenced
                            emDelimiter: _
                            strongDelimiter: '**'
                            strikeDelimiter: ~~
                            maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                            keepDataImages: false
                            useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                            useInlineLinks: true
                    required:
                      - url
                  requestTimestamp:
                    type: string
                    description: Request timestamp for getMarkdown
                    examples:
                      - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                required:
                  - id
                  - path
                  - success
                  - requestOptions
                  - requestTimestamp
              - type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
                  path:
                    const: read-readUrl
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  requestOptions:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadOptions'
                  error:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadErrorResponse'
                  requestTimestamp:
                    type: string
                    description: Request timestamp for readUrl
                    examples:
                      - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                required:
                  - id
                  - path
                  - success
                  - requestOptions
                  - requestTimestamp
              - type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
                  path:
                    const: links-getLinks
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  requestOptions:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksOptions'
                  error:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksErrorResponse'
                  requestTimestamp:
                    type: string
                    description: Request timestamp for getLinks
                    examples:
                      - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                required:
                  - id
                  - path
                  - success
                  - requestOptions
                  - requestTimestamp
              - type: object
                properties:
                  id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
                  path:
                    const: links-extractLinks
                  success:
                    type: boolean
                  requestOptions:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksOptions'
                  error:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksErrorResponse'
                  requestTimestamp:
                    type: string
                    description: Request timestamp for extractLinks
                    examples:
                      - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                required:
                  - id
                  - path
                  - success
                  - requestOptions
                  - requestTimestamp
          description: >-
            Array of activity log entries with request options and no response
            reconstruction payload
        meta:
          type: object
          properties:
            limit:
              type: integer
              minimum: 1
              maximum: 9007199254740991
              description: Effective limit applied to the result set
            offset:
              type: integer
              minimum: 0
              maximum: 9007199254740991
              description: Effective offset applied to the result set
            hasMore:
              type: boolean
              description: Indicates if more logs are available beyond this page
            nextOffset:
              anyOf:
                - type: integer
                  minimum: 0
                  maximum: 9007199254740991
                - type: 'null'
              description: >-
                Offset to request the next page. Null when no additional data
                exists.
            orderBy:
              enum:
                - requestTimestamp
                - path
                - requestUrl
                - success
                - id
              description: Column key used for sorting
              examples:
                - requestTimestamp
                - path
                - requestUrl
                - success
                - id
            orderDir:
              enum:
                - asc
                - desc
              description: Sort direction applied to the result set
              examples:
                - asc
                - desc
            startDate:
              type: string
              description: >-
                Start date boundary (ISO 8601) that was applied after
                normalization.
            endDate:
              type: string
              description: >-
                End date boundary (ISO 8601) that was applied after
                normalization.
          required:
            - limit
            - offset
            - hasMore
            - nextOffset
            - orderBy
            - orderDir
          description: Pagination and filtering metadata for the response
      required:
        - logs
        - meta
      description: Paginated activity log entries with metadata
openapi: 3.1.1
paths:
  /read:
    get:
      operationId: read.getMarkdown
      summary: Get page markdown content
      description: >-
        Endpoint: GET `api.deepcrawl.dev/read?url=example.com`


        Directly return page markdown content from the request URL as a string
        response. For advanced use cases, use the POST method instead or use the
        `readUrl` from `Deepcrawl SDK`.
      tags:
        - Read URL
      parameters:
        - name: url
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            description: The URL to read and extract content from
            examples:
              - https://example.com
              - example.com
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: cacheOptions
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
            description: >-
              Cache configuration for read operation based on KV put options
              except for `metadata`
            examples:
              - enabled: true
                expirationTtl: 172800
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: cleaningProcessor
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            enum:
              - cheerio-reader
              - html-rewriter
            default: cheerio-reader
            description: The cleaning processor to use.
            examples:
              - cheerio-reader
              - html-rewriter
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: markdownConverterOptions
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: object
            properties:
              preferNativeParser:
                type: boolean
                default: false
                title: Prefer Native Parser
                description: >-
                  Use native window DOMParser when available instead of fallback
                  parser (default: false)
                examples:
                  - false
                  - true
              codeFence:
                type: string
                default: '```'
                title: Code Fence
                description: 'Characters used to wrap code blocks (default: "```")'
                examples:
                  - '```'
                  - ~~~
              bulletMarker:
                type: string
                default: '*'
                title: Bullet Marker
                description: Character used for unordered list items
                examples:
                  - '*'
                  - '-'
                  - +
              codeBlockStyle:
                enum:
                  - indented
                  - fenced
                default: fenced
                title: Code Block Style
                description: >-
                  How to format code blocks - either indented (4 spaces) or
                  fenced (with code fence characters)
                examples:
                  - fenced
                  - indented
              emDelimiter:
                type: string
                default: _
                title: Emphasis Delimiter
                description: 'Characters used to wrap emphasized (italic) text (default: _)'
                examples:
                  - _
                  - '*'
              strongDelimiter:
                type: string
                default: '**'
                title: Strong Delimiter
                description: 'Characters used to wrap strong (bold) text (default: **)'
                examples:
                  - '**'
                  - __
              strikeDelimiter:
                type: string
                default: ~~
                title: Strike Delimiter
                description: 'Characters used to wrap strikethrough text (default: ~~)'
                examples:
                  - ~~
              ignore:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
                title: Ignore Elements
                description: >-
                  HTML elements to completely ignore (including their content)
                  during conversion
                examples:
                  - - script
                    - style
                  - - nav
                    - footer
              blockElements:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
                title: Block Elements
                description: >-
                  HTML elements to treat as block elements (surrounded with
                  blank lines)
                examples:
                  - - div
                    - section
                  - - article
                    - aside
              maxConsecutiveNewlines:
                type: integer
                minimum: -9007199254740991
                maximum: 9007199254740991
                exclusiveMinimum: 0
                default: 3
                title: Max Consecutive Newlines
                description: Maximum number of consecutive newlines to preserve in output
                examples:
                  - 3
                  - 2
                  - 1
              lineStartEscape:
                type: array
                prefixItems:
                  - not: {}
                  - type: string
                title: Line Start Escape
                description: >-
                  Pattern and replacement for escaping special characters at
                  line start
                examples:
                  - - /^(\d+\.)/
                    - \$1
              globalEscape:
                type: array
                prefixItems:
                  - not: {}
                  - type: string
                title: Global Escape
                description: >-
                  Pattern and replacement for escaping special characters
                  globally
                examples:
                  - - /([*_`])/g
                    - \$1
              textReplace:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: array
                  prefixItems:
                    - not: {}
                    - type: string
                title: Text Replace
                description: >-
                  Array of pattern-replacement pairs for custom text
                  transformations
                examples:
                  - - - /\s+/g
                      - ' '
                  - - - /&nbsp;/g
                      - ' '
                    - - /&amp;/g
                      - '&'
              keepDataImages:
                type: boolean
                default: false
                title: Keep Data Images
                description: >-
                  Whether to preserve images with data: URIs (can be up to 1MB
                  each) (default: false)
                examples:
                  - false
                  - true
              useLinkReferenceDefinitions:
                type: boolean
                default: false
                title: Use Link Reference Definitions
                description: >-
                  Format links using reference definitions at bottom instead of
                  inline (default: false)
                examples:
                  - false
                  - true
              useInlineLinks:
                type: boolean
                default: true
                title: Use Inline Links
                description: >-
                  Wrap URL text in <> instead of []() syntax when text matches
                  URL (default: true)
                examples:
                  - true
                  - false
            default:
              preferNativeParser: false
              codeFence: '```'
              bulletMarker: '*'
              codeBlockStyle: fenced
              emDelimiter: _
              strongDelimiter: '**'
              strikeDelimiter: ~~
              maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
              keepDataImages: false
              useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
              useInlineLinks: true
            title: MarkdownConverterOptions
            description: Options for markdown conversion.
            examples:
              - preferNativeParser: false
                codeFence: '```'
                bulletMarker: '*'
                codeBlockStyle: fenced
                emDelimiter: _
                strongDelimiter: '**'
                strikeDelimiter: ~~
                maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                keepDataImages: false
                useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                useInlineLinks: true
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Page markdown content
          content:
            text/markdown:
              schema:
                type: string
                description: >-
                  NOTE - expecting a text/markdown string response instead of an
                  application/json object
                examples:
                  - >-
                    # Example Page


                    This is an example markdown content extracted from the
                    webpage.


                    ## Main Content


                    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
        '429':
          description: Rate limit exceeded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: RATE_LIMITED
                      status:
                        const: 429
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Rate limit exceeded
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          operation:
                            type: string
                            description: The operation that was rate limited
                            examples:
                              - read GET
                              - read POST
                              - links GET
                              - links POST
                          retryAfter:
                            type: integer
                            minimum: -9007199254740991
                            maximum: 9007199254740991
                            description: The time to retry in seconds
                            examples:
                              - 10
                        required:
                          - operation
                          - retryAfter
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
        '500':
          description: Content reading failed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: READ_ERROR_RESPONSE
                      status:
                        const: 500
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Failed to read content from URL
                      data:
                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadErrorResponse'
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
    post:
      operationId: read.readUrl
      summary: Read a URL
      description: >-
        Endpoint: POST `api.deepcrawl.dev/read`


        Read a URL and return the full detailed result object. This is a POST
        request can handle more complex requests and use cases.
      tags:
        - Read URL
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadOptions'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Page markdown content
          content:
            text/markdown:
              schema:
                type: string
                description: >-
                  NOTE - expecting a text/markdown string response instead of an
                  application/json object
                examples:
                  - >-
                    # Example Page


                    This is an example markdown content extracted from the
                    webpage.


                    ## Main Content


                    Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
        '429':
          description: Rate limit exceeded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: RATE_LIMITED
                      status:
                        const: 429
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Rate limit exceeded
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          operation:
                            type: string
                            description: The operation that was rate limited
                            examples:
                              - read GET
                              - read POST
                              - links GET
                              - links POST
                          retryAfter:
                            type: integer
                            minimum: -9007199254740991
                            maximum: 9007199254740991
                            description: The time to retry in seconds
                            examples:
                              - 10
                        required:
                          - operation
                          - retryAfter
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
        '500':
          description: Content reading failed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: READ_ERROR_RESPONSE
                      status:
                        const: 500
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Failed to read content from URL
                      data:
                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadErrorResponse'
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
  /links:
    get:
      operationId: links.getLinks
      summary: Get page links
      description: |-
        Endpoint: GET `api.deepcrawl.dev/links?url=example.com`

        Directly return page links from the request URL as a string response.
      tags:
        - Extract Links
      parameters:
        - name: url
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            description: The URL to extract links from. Must be a valid URL string.
            examples:
              - https://example.com
              - example.com
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: tree
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: true
            description: 'Whether to build a site map tree. Default: true'
            examples:
              - true
              - false
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: linkExtractionOptions
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinkExtractionOptions'
            title: LinkExtractionOptions
            description: 'Options for link extraction. Default: [object Object]'
            examples:
              - includeExternal: false
                includeMedia: false
                removeQueryParams: true
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: cacheOptions
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
            description: >-
              Cache configuration for links operation based on KV put options
              except for `metadata`
            examples:
              - enabled: true
                expirationTtl: 172800
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: metricsOptions
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: object
            properties:
              enable:
                type: boolean
                default: true
                description: Whether to enable metrics.
                examples:
                  - true
                  - false
            default:
              enable: true
            description: Options for metrics for links operation.
            examples:
              - enable: true
              - false
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: folderFirst
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: true
            description: >-
              Whether to place folders before leaf nodes in the tree. Default:
              true
            examples:
              - true
              - false
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: linksOrder
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            enum:
              - page
              - alphabetical
            default: page
            description: >-
              How to order links within each folder: "page" (preserve original
              order) or "alphabetical" (sort A→Z by URL). Default: page
            examples:
              - alphabetical
              - page
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: extractedLinks
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: true
            description: >-
              Whether to include extracted links for each node in the tree.
              Default: true
            examples:
              - true
              - false
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: subdomainAsRootUrl
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: true
            description: >-
              Whether to treat subdomain as root URL. If false, subdomain will
              be excluded from root URL. e.g., if false: rootUrl:
              `https://swr.vercel.app` -> `https://vercel.app`. Default: true
            examples:
              - true
              - false
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: isPlatformUrl
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: false
            description: >-
              Whether the URL is a platform URL. If true, the targetUrl will be
              the platform URL. e.g., if true: targetUrl: `https://github.com`
              -> `https://github.com/lumpinif`. Default: false
            examples:
              - false
              - true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: metadata
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: true
            description: Whether to extract metadata from the page.
            examples:
              - true
              - false
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: cleanedHtml
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: false
            description: Whether to return cleaned HTML.
            examples:
              - false
              - true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: robots
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: false
            description: Whether to fetch and parse robots.txt.
            examples:
              - false
              - true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: sitemapXML
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
            default: false
            description: >-
              ( NOTE: sitemapXML is not stable yet, please use with caution. It
              may not work as expected. ) Whether to fetch and parse
              sitemap.xml.
            examples:
              - false
              - true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: metadataOptions
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MetadataOptions'
            description: Options for metadata extraction.
            examples:
              - title: true
                description: true
                language: true
                canonical: true
                robots: true
                author: true
                keywords: true
                favicon: true
                openGraph: true
                twitter: true
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: cleaningProcessor
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            enum:
              - cheerio-reader
              - html-rewriter
            default: cheerio-reader
            description: The cleaning processor to use.
            examples:
              - cheerio-reader
              - html-rewriter
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: htmlRewriterOptions
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/HTMLRewriterOptions'
            description: Options for HTML cleaning with html-rewriter.
            examples:
              - extractMainContent: true
                removeBase64Images: true
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: readerCleaningOptions
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReaderCleaningOptions'
            description: Options for HTML cleaning with cheerio-reader.
            examples:
              - readerOptions:
                  debug: true
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
        - name: fetchOptions
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/FetchOptions'
            description: Options for the fetch request.
            examples:
              - method: GET
                headers:
                  User-Agent: Deepcrawl-Bot/1.0 (+https://deepcrawl.dev)
                  Accept: >-
                    text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
                  Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
                redirect: follow
          style: deepObject
          explode: true
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                anyOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      success:
                        const: true
                        description: Indicates that the operation was successful
                        examples:
                          - true
                      targetUrl:
                        type: string
                        description: The URL that was requested to be processed
                        examples:
                          - https://example.com
                      timestamp:
                        type: string
                        description: ISO timestamp when the request was processed
                        examples:
                          - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                      requestId:
                        type: string
                        description: >-
                          Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log
                          entry
                        examples:
                          - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                      cached:
                        type: boolean
                        description: Whether the result was returned from cache
                        examples:
                          - false
                      ancestors:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                        description: Array of parent URLs leading to this URL
                        examples:
                          - https://example.com
                      metrics:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          readableDuration:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              Human-readable representation of the operation
                              duration
                            examples:
                              - 0.2s
                          durationMs:
                            type: number
                            description: Duration of the operation in milliseconds
                            examples:
                              - 200
                          startTimeMs:
                            type: number
                            description: >-
                              Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation
                              started
                            examples:
                              - 1704067800000
                          endTimeMs:
                            type: number
                            description: >-
                              Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation
                              finished
                            examples:
                              - 1704067800200
                        required:
                          - readableDuration
                          - durationMs
                          - startTimeMs
                          - endTimeMs
                        title: Metrics
                        description: Metrics for the links extraction operation
                        examples:
                          - readableDuration: 0.2s
                            durationMs: 200
                            startTimeMs: 1704067800000
                            endTimeMs: 1704067800200
                      tree:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          url:
                            type: string
                            description: The URL of this page
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/about
                          rootUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: The root URL of the website being crawled
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com
                          name:
                            type: string
                            description: The display name or title of this page
                            examples:
                              - About Us
                          totalUrls:
                            type: number
                            description: Total number of URLs discovered in the entire tree
                            examples:
                              - 150
                          lastUpdated:
                            type: string
                            description: ISO timestamp when this page was last crawled
                            examples:
                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                          lastVisited:
                            anyOf:
                              - type: string
                              - type: 'null'
                            description: >-
                              ISO timestamp when this page was last visited
                              (null if never visited)
                            examples:
                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                          error:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              Error message if there was an issue processing
                              this page
                            examples:
                              - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                          metadata:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                            title: PageMetadata
                            description: >-
                              Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                              description, etc.)
                          cleanedHtml:
                            type: string
                            description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                          extractedLinks:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                            title: ExtractedLinks
                            description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
                          skippedUrls:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                            title: SkippedLinks
                            description: >-
                              URLs that were skipped during processing with
                              reasons
                          children:
                            type: array
                            items:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                url:
                                  type: string
                                  description: The URL of this page
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com/about
                                rootUrl:
                                  type: string
                                  description: The root URL of the website being crawled
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com
                                name:
                                  type: string
                                  description: The display name or title of this page
                                  examples:
                                    - About Us
                                totalUrls:
                                  type: number
                                  description: >-
                                    Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                    entire tree
                                  examples:
                                    - 150
                                lastUpdated:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                    crawled
                                  examples:
                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                lastVisited:
                                  anyOf:
                                    - type: string
                                    - type: 'null'
                                  description: >-
                                    ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                    visited (null if never visited)
                                  examples:
                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                error:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    Error message if there was an issue
                                    processing this page
                                  examples:
                                    - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                metadata:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                  title: PageMetadata
                                  description: >-
                                    Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                    description, etc.)
                                cleanedHtml:
                                  type: string
                                  description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                extractedLinks:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                  title: ExtractedLinks
                                  description: >-
                                    Links found on this page, categorized by
                                    type
                                skippedUrls:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                  title: SkippedLinks
                                  description: >-
                                    URLs that were skipped during processing
                                    with reasons
                                children:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      url:
                                        type: string
                                        description: The URL of this page
                                        examples:
                                          - https://example.com/about
                                      rootUrl:
                                        type: string
                                        description: >-
                                          The root URL of the website being
                                          crawled
                                        examples:
                                          - https://example.com
                                      name:
                                        type: string
                                        description: The display name or title of this page
                                        examples:
                                          - About Us
                                      totalUrls:
                                        type: number
                                        description: >-
                                          Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                          entire tree
                                        examples:
                                          - 150
                                      lastUpdated:
                                        type: string
                                        description: >-
                                          ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                          crawled
                                        examples:
                                          - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                      lastVisited:
                                        anyOf:
                                          - type: string
                                          - type: 'null'
                                        description: >-
                                          ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                          visited (null if never visited)
                                        examples:
                                          - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                      error:
                                        type: string
                                        description: >-
                                          Error message if there was an issue
                                          processing this page
                                        examples:
                                          - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                      metadata:
                                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                        title: PageMetadata
                                        description: >-
                                          Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                          description, etc.)
                                      cleanedHtml:
                                        type: string
                                        description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                      extractedLinks:
                                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                        title: ExtractedLinks
                                        description: >-
                                          Links found on this page, categorized by
                                          type
                                      skippedUrls:
                                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                        title: SkippedLinks
                                        description: >-
                                          URLs that were skipped during processing
                                          with reasons
                                      children:
                                        type: array
                                        items:
                                          type: object
                                          properties:
                                            url:
                                              type: string
                                              description: The URL of this page
                                              examples:
                                                - https://example.com/about
                                            rootUrl:
                                              type: string
                                              description: >-
                                                The root URL of the website being
                                                crawled
                                              examples:
                                                - https://example.com
                                            name:
                                              type: string
                                              description: The display name or title of this page
                                              examples:
                                                - About Us
                                            totalUrls:
                                              type: number
                                              description: >-
                                                Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                                entire tree
                                              examples:
                                                - 150
                                            lastUpdated:
                                              type: string
                                              description: >-
                                                ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                crawled
                                              examples:
                                                - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                            lastVisited:
                                              anyOf:
                                                - type: string
                                                - type: 'null'
                                              description: >-
                                                ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                visited (null if never visited)
                                              examples:
                                                - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                            error:
                                              type: string
                                              description: >-
                                                Error message if there was an issue
                                                processing this page
                                              examples:
                                                - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                            metadata:
                                              $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                              title: PageMetadata
                                              description: >-
                                                Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                                description, etc.)
                                            cleanedHtml:
                                              type: string
                                              description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                            extractedLinks:
                                              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                              title: ExtractedLinks
                                              description: >-
                                                Links found on this page, categorized by
                                                type
                                            skippedUrls:
                                              $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                              title: SkippedLinks
                                              description: >-
                                                URLs that were skipped during processing
                                                with reasons
                                            children:
                                              type: array
                                              items:
                                                type: object
                                                properties:
                                                  url:
                                                    type: string
                                                    description: The URL of this page
                                                    examples:
                                                      - https://example.com/about
                                                  rootUrl:
                                                    type: string
                                                    description: >-
                                                      The root URL of the website being
                                                      crawled
                                                    examples:
                                                      - https://example.com
                                                  name:
                                                    type: string
                                                    description: The display name or title of this page
                                                    examples:
                                                      - About Us
                                                  totalUrls:
                                                    type: number
                                                    description: >-
                                                      Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                                      entire tree
                                                    examples:
                                                      - 150
                                                  lastUpdated:
                                                    type: string
                                                    description: >-
                                                      ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                      crawled
                                                    examples:
                                                      - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                  lastVisited:
                                                    anyOf:
                                                      - type: string
                                                      - type: 'null'
                                                    description: >-
                                                      ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                      visited (null if never visited)
                                                    examples:
                                                      - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                  error:
                                                    type: string
                                                    description: >-
                                                      Error message if there was an issue
                                                      processing this page
                                                    examples:
                                                      - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                                  metadata:
                                                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                                    title: PageMetadata
                                                    description: >-
                                                      Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                                      description, etc.)
                                                  cleanedHtml:
                                                    type: string
                                                    description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                                  extractedLinks:
                                                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                                    title: ExtractedLinks
                                                    description: >-
                                                      Links found on this page, categorized by
                                                      type
                                                  skippedUrls:
                                                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                                    title: SkippedLinks
                                                    description: >-
                                                      URLs that were skipped during processing
                                                      with reasons
                                                  children:
                                                    type: array
                                                    items:
                                                      anyOf:
                                                        - {}
                                                        - type: 'null'
                                                    title: LinksTree
                                                    description: >-
                                                      Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                                      representing a page found under this
                                                      URL. This creates a recursive tree
                                                      structure for the entire website
                                                      hierarchy.
                                                    examples:
                                                      - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                        name: Team
                                                        lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                        children: []
                                                      - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                        name: History
                                                        lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                        children:
                                                          - url: >-
                                                              https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                            name: Company Founding
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                                required:
                                                  - url
                                                  - lastUpdated
                                                title: LinksTree
                                                description: >-
                                                  A node in the site map tree representing
                                                  a webpage and its children
                                                examples:
                                                  - url: https://example.com/about
                                                    rootUrl: https://example.com
                                                    name: About Us
                                                    totalUrls: 150
                                                    lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                    lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                    metadata:
                                                      title: About Us - Example Company
                                                      description: >-
                                                        Learn more about our company history and
                                                        mission.
                                                      language: en
                                                      canonical: https://example.com/about
                                                      robots: index,follow

                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksSuccessResponseWithoutTree'
                title: LinksSuccessResponse
                description: >-
                  Successful response from the links extraction operation.
                  Response structure varies based on whether tree generation is
                  enabled.
                examples:
                  - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                    success: true
                    cached: false
                    targetUrl: https://example.com
                    timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                    ancestors:
                      - https://example.com
                    tree:
                      url: https://example.com
                      rootUrl: https://example.com
                      name: Home
                      totalUrls: 25
                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                      metadata:
                        title: Example Website
                        description: Welcome to our example website
                      extractedLinks:
                        internal:

                      skippedUrls:
                        internal:

                          name: About
                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:05.000Z'
