        '429':
          description: Rate limit exceeded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: RATE_LIMITED
                      status:
                        const: 429
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Rate limit exceeded
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          operation:
                            type: string
                            description: The operation that was rate limited
                            examples:
                              - read GET
                              - read POST
                              - links GET
                              - links POST
                          retryAfter:
                            type: integer
                            minimum: -9007199254740991
                            maximum: 9007199254740991
                            description: The time to retry in seconds
                            examples:
                              - 10
                        required:
                          - operation
                          - retryAfter
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
        '500':
          description: Links extraction failed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: LINKS_ERROR_RESPONSE
                      status:
                        const: 500
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Failed to extract links from URL
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          requestId:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity
                              log entry
                            examples:
                              - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                          success:
                            const: false
                            description: Indicates that the operation failed
                            examples:
                              - false
                          requestUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              The URL, raw url, that was requested to be
                              processed and might be different from the target
                              url
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/article#fragment
                          targetUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              The URL that was being processed when the error
                              occurred
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/article
                          timestamp:
                            type: string
                            description: ISO timestamp when the error occurred
                            examples:
                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                          error:
                            type: string
                            description: Error message describing what went wrong
                            examples:
                              - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                          tree:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              url:
                                type: string
                                description: The URL of this page
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com/about
                              rootUrl:
                                type: string
                                description: The root URL of the website being crawled
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com
                              name:
                                type: string
                                description: The display name or title of this page
                                examples:
                                  - About Us
                              totalUrls:
                                type: number
                                description: >-
                                  Total number of URLs discovered in the entire
                                  tree
                                examples:
                                  - 150
                              lastUpdated:
                                type: string
                                description: ISO timestamp when this page was last crawled
                                examples:
                                  - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                              lastVisited:
                                anyOf:
                                  - type: string
                                  - type: 'null'
                                description: >-
                                  ISO timestamp when this page was last visited
                                  (null if never visited)
                                examples:
                                  - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                              error:
                                type: string
                                description: >-
                                  Error message if there was an issue processing
                                  this page
                                examples:
                                  - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                              metadata:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                title: PageMetadata
                                description: >-
                                  Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                  description, etc.)
                              cleanedHtml:
                                type: string
                                description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                              extractedLinks:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                title: ExtractedLinks
                                description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
                              skippedUrls:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                title: SkippedLinks
                                description: >-
                                  URLs that were skipped during processing with
                                  reasons
                              children:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    url:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The URL of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com/about
                                    rootUrl:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        The root URL of the website being
                                        crawled
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com
                                    name:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The display name or title of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - About Us
                                    totalUrls:
                                      type: number
                                      description: >-
                                        Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                        entire tree
                                      examples:
                                        - 150
                                    lastUpdated:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        crawled
                                      examples:
                                        - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                    lastVisited:
                                      anyOf:
                                        - type: string
                                        - type: 'null'
                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        visited (null if never visited)
                                      examples:
                                        - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                    error:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        Error message if there was an issue
                                        processing this page
                                      examples:
                                        - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                    metadata:
                                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                      title: PageMetadata
                                      description: >-
                                        Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                        description, etc.)
                                    cleanedHtml:
                                      type: string
                                      description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                    extractedLinks:
                                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                      title: ExtractedLinks
                                      description: >-
                                        Links found on this page, categorized by
                                        type
                                    skippedUrls:
                                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                      title: SkippedLinks
                                      description: >-
                                        URLs that were skipped during processing
                                        with reasons
                                    children:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: object
                                        properties:
                                          url:
                                            type: string
                                            description: The URL of this page
                                            examples:
                                              - https://example.com/about
                                          rootUrl:
                                            type: string
                                            description: >-
                                              The root URL of the website being
                                              crawled
                                            examples:
                                              - https://example.com
                                          name:
                                            type: string
                                            description: The display name or title of this page
                                            examples:
                                              - About Us
                                          totalUrls:
                                            type: number
                                            description: >-
                                              Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                              entire tree
                                            examples:
                                              - 150
                                          lastUpdated:
                                            type: string
                                            description: >-
                                              ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                              crawled
                                            examples:
                                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                          lastVisited:
                                            anyOf:
                                              - type: string
                                              - type: 'null'
                                            description: >-
                                              ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                              visited (null if never visited)
                                            examples:
                                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                          error:
                                            type: string
                                            description: >-
                                              Error message if there was an issue
                                              processing this page
                                            examples:
                                              - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                          metadata:
                                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                            title: PageMetadata
                                            description: >-
                                              Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                              description, etc.)
                                          cleanedHtml:
                                            type: string
                                            description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                          extractedLinks:
                                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                            title: ExtractedLinks
                                            description: >-
                                              Links found on this page, categorized by
                                              type
                                          skippedUrls:
                                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                            title: SkippedLinks
                                            description: >-
                                              URLs that were skipped during processing
                                              with reasons
                                          children:
                                            type: array
                                            items:
                                              type: object
                                              properties:
                                                url:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: The URL of this page
                                                  examples:
                                                    - https://example.com/about
                                                rootUrl:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: >-
                                                    The root URL of the website being
                                                    crawled
                                                  examples:
                                                    - https://example.com
                                                name:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: The display name or title of this page
                                                  examples:
                                                    - About Us
                                                totalUrls:
                                                  type: number
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                                    entire tree
                                                  examples:
                                                    - 150
                                                lastUpdated:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: >-
                                                    ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                    crawled
                                                  examples:
                                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                lastVisited:
                                                  anyOf:
                                                    - type: string
                                                    - type: 'null'
                                                  description: >-
                                                    ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                    visited (null if never visited)
                                                  examples:
                                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                error:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Error message if there was an issue
                                                    processing this page
                                                  examples:
                                                    - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                                metadata:
                                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                                  title: PageMetadata
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                                    description, etc.)
                                                cleanedHtml:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                                extractedLinks:
                                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                                  title: ExtractedLinks
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Links found on this page, categorized by
                                                    type
                                                skippedUrls:
                                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                                  title: SkippedLinks
                                                  description: >-
                                                    URLs that were skipped during processing
                                                    with reasons
                                                children:
                                                  type: array
                                                  items:
                                                    type: object
                                                    properties:
                                                      url:
                                                        type: string
                                                        description: The URL of this page
                                                        examples:
                                                          - https://example.com/about
                                                      rootUrl:
                                                        type: string
                                                        description: >-
                                                          The root URL of the website being
                                                          crawled
                                                        examples:
                                                          - https://example.com
                                                      name:
                                                        type: string
                                                        description: The display name or title of this page
                                                        examples:
                                                          - About Us
                                                      totalUrls:
                                                        type: number
                                                        description: >-
                                                          Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                                          entire tree
                                                        examples:
                                                          - 150
                                                      lastUpdated:
                                                        type: string
                                                        description: >-
                                                          ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                          crawled
                                                        examples:
                                                          - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                      lastVisited:
                                                        anyOf:
                                                          - type: string
                                                          - type: 'null'
                                                        description: >-
                                                          ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                          visited (null if never visited)
                                                        examples:
                                                          - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                      error:
                                                        type: string
                                                        description: >-
                                                          Error message if there was an issue
                                                          processing this page
                                                        examples:
                                                          - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                                      metadata:
                                                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                                        title: PageMetadata
                                                        description: >-
                                                          Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                                          description, etc.)
                                                      cleanedHtml:
                                                        type: string
                                                        description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                                      extractedLinks:
                                                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                                        title: ExtractedLinks
                                                        description: >-
                                                          Links found on this page, categorized by
                                                          type
                                                      skippedUrls:
                                                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                                        title: SkippedLinks
                                                        description: >-
                                                          URLs that were skipped during processing
                                                          with reasons
                                                      children:
                                                        type: array
                                                        items:
                                                          anyOf:
                                                            - {}
                                                            - type: 'null'
                                                        title: LinksTree
                                                        description: >-
                                                          Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                                          representing a page found under this
                                                          URL. This creates a recursive tree
                                                          structure for the entire website
                                                          hierarchy.
                                                        examples:
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                            name: Team
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                            children: []
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                            name: History
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                            children:
                                                              - url: >-
                                                                  https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                                name: Company Founding
                                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                                    required:
                                                      - url
                                                      - lastUpdated
                                                    title: LinksTree
                                                    description: >-
                                                      A node in the site map tree representing
                                                      a webpage and its children
                                                    examples:
                                                      - url: https://example.com/about
                                                        rootUrl: https://example.com
                                                        name: About Us
                                                        totalUrls: 150
                                                        lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                        lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                        metadata:
                                                          title: About Us - Example Company
                                                          description: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          language: en
                                                          canonical: https://example.com/about
                                                          robots: index,follow
                                                          author: Example Company
                                                          keywords:
                                                            - about
                                                            - company
                                                            - history
                                                          favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                                                          ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                          ogDescription: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
                                                          ogUrl: https://example.com/about
                                                          twitterCard: summary_large_image
                                                          twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                          twitterDescription: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                                                          isIframeAllowed: true
                                                        extractedLinks:
                                                          internal:
                                                            - https://example.com/about/team
                                                            - https://example.com/about/history
                                                            - https://example.com/contact
                                                          external:
                                                            - https://partner-company.com
                                                            - https://industry-association.org
                                                          media:
                                                            images:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                                                            videos:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                                                            documents:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
                                                        children:
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                            name: Our Team
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                            children: []
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                            name: Company History
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                            children:
                                                              - url: >-
                                                                  https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                                name: Company Founding
                                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                                                children: []
                                                  title: LinksTree
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                                    representing a page found under this
                                                    URL. This creates a recursive tree
                                                    structure for the entire website
                                                    hierarchy.
                                                  examples:
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/team

                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'

                                                          name: Company Founding
                                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'

                            required:
                              - url
                              - lastUpdated
                            title: LinksTree
                            description: >-
                              LinksTree - Partial site map tree if available, or
                              undefined if no tree could be generated
                        required:
                          - requestId
                          - success
                          - targetUrl
                          - timestamp
                          - error
                        title: LinksErrorResponse
                        description: Error response from the links extraction operation
                        examples:
                          - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                            success: false
                            requestUrl: https://example.com/article#fragment
                            targetUrl: https://example.com
                            timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                            error: 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
    post:
      operationId: links.extractLinks
      summary: Extract links from a URL
      description: >-
        Endpoint: POST `api.deepcrawl.dev/links`


        Extract links from a URL and return the full detailed result object.
        This is a POST request can handle more complex requests and use cases.
      tags:
        - Extract Links
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinksOptions'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                anyOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      success:
                        const: true
                        description: Indicates that the operation was successful
                        examples:
                          - true
                      targetUrl:
                        type: string
                        description: The URL that was requested to be processed
                        examples:
                          - https://example.com
                      timestamp:
                        type: string
                        description: ISO timestamp when the request was processed
                        examples:
                          - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                      requestId:
                        type: string
                        description: >-
                          Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log
                          entry
                        examples:
                          - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                      cached:
                        type: boolean
                        description: Whether the result was returned from cache
                        examples:
                          - false
                      ancestors:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                        description: Array of parent URLs leading to this URL
                        examples:
                          - https://example.com
                      metrics:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          readableDuration:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              Human-readable representation of the operation
                              duration
                            examples:
                              - 0.2s
                          durationMs:
                            type: number
                            description: Duration of the operation in milliseconds
                            examples:
                              - 200
                          startTimeMs:
                            type: number
                            description: >-
                              Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation
                              started
                            examples:
                              - 1704067800000
                          endTimeMs:
                            type: number
                            description: >-
                              Timestamp in milliseconds when the operation
                              finished
                            examples:
                              - 1704067800200
                        required:
                          - readableDuration
                          - durationMs
                          - startTimeMs
                          - endTimeMs
                        title: Metrics
                        description: Metrics for the links extraction operation
                        examples:
                          - readableDuration: 0.2s
                            durationMs: 200
                            startTimeMs: 1704067800000
                            endTimeMs: 1704067800200
                      tree:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          url:
                            type: string
                            description: The URL of this page
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/about
                          rootUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: The root URL of the website being crawled
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com
                          name:
                            type: string
                            description: The display name or title of this page
                            examples:
                              - About Us
                          totalUrls:
                            type: number
                            description: Total number of URLs discovered in the entire tree
                            examples:
                              - 150
                          lastUpdated:
                            type: string
                            description: ISO timestamp when this page was last crawled
                            examples:
                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                          lastVisited:
                            anyOf:
                              - type: string
                              - type: 'null'
                            description: >-
                              ISO timestamp when this page was last visited
                              (null if never visited)
                            examples:
                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                          error:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              Error message if there was an issue processing
                              this page
                            examples:
                              - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                          metadata:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                            title: PageMetadata
                            description: >-
                              Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                              description, etc.)
                          cleanedHtml:
                            type: string
                            description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                          extractedLinks:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                            title: ExtractedLinks
                            description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
                          skippedUrls:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                            title: SkippedLinks
                            description: >-
                              URLs that were skipped during processing with
                              reasons
                          children:
                            type: array
                            items:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                url:
                                  type: string
                                  description: The URL of this page
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com/about
                                rootUrl:
                                  type: string
                                  description: The root URL of the website being crawled
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com
                                name:
                                  type: string
                                  description: The display name or title of this page
                                  examples:
                                    - About Us
                                totalUrls:
                                  type: number
                                  description: >-
                                    Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                    entire tree
                                  examples:
                                    - 150
                                lastUpdated:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                    crawled
                                  examples:
                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'

                          documents:
                            - https://example.com/brochure.pdf
                      skippedUrls:
                        internal:
                          - url: https://example.com/admin
                            reason: Blocked by robots.txt
                      children:
                        - url: https://example.com/about
                          name: About
                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:05.000Z'
                  - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                    success: true
                    cached: false
                    targetUrl: https://example.com
                    timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                    ancestors:
                      - https://example.com
                    title: Example Website
                    description: Welcome to our example website
                    extractedLinks:
                      internal:
                        - https://example.com/about
                        - https://example.com/contact
                      external:
                        - https://external-site.com/reference
                      media:
                        images:
                          - https://example.com/logo.png
                        videos: []
                        documents:
                          - https://example.com/brochure.pdf
                    skippedUrls:
                      internal:
                        - url: https://example.com/admin
                          reason: Blocked by robots.txt
        '429':
          description: Rate limit exceeded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: RATE_LIMITED
                      status:
                        const: 429
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Rate limit exceeded
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          operation:
                            type: string
                            description: The operation that was rate limited
                            examples:
                              - read GET
                              - read POST
                              - links GET
                              - links POST
                          retryAfter:
                            type: integer
                            minimum: -9007199254740991
                            maximum: 9007199254740991
                            description: The time to retry in seconds
                            examples:
                              - 10
                        required:
                          - operation
                          - retryAfter
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
        '500':
          description: Links extraction failed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: LINKS_ERROR_RESPONSE
                      status:
                        const: 500
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Failed to extract links from URL
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          requestId:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity
                              log entry
                            examples:
                              - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                          success:
                            const: false
                            description: Indicates that the operation failed
                            examples:
                              - false
                          requestUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              The URL, raw url, that was requested to be
                              processed and might be different from the target
                              url
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/article#fragment
                          targetUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              The URL that was being processed when the error
                              occurred
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/article
                          timestamp:
                            type: string
                            description: ISO timestamp when the error occurred
                            examples:
                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                          error:
                            type: string
                            description: Error message describing what went wrong
                            examples:
                              - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                          tree:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              url:
                                type: string
                                description: The URL of this page
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com/about
                              rootUrl:
                                type: string
                                description: The root URL of the website being crawled
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com
                              name:
                                type: string
                                description: The display name or title of this page
                                examples:
                                  - About Us
                              totalUrls:
                                type: number
                                description: >-
                                  Total number of URLs discovered in the entire
                                  tree
                                examples:
                                  - 150
                              lastUpdated:
                                type: string
                                description: ISO timestamp when this page was last crawled
                                examples:
                                  - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                              lastVisited:
                                anyOf:
                                  - type: string
                                  - type: 'null'
                                description: >-
                                  ISO timestamp when this page was last visited
                                  (null if never visited)
                                examples:
                                  - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                              error:
                                type: string
                                description: >-
                                  Error message if there was an issue processing
                                  this page
                                examples:
                                  - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                              metadata:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                title: PageMetadata
                                description: >-
                                  Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                  description, etc.)
                              cleanedHtml:
                                type: string
                                description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                              extractedLinks:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                title: ExtractedLinks
                                description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
                              skippedUrls:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                title: SkippedLinks
                                description: >-
                                  URLs that were skipped during processing with
                                  reasons
                              children:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    url:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The URL of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com/about
                                    rootUrl:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        The root URL of the website being
                                        crawled
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com
                                    name:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The display name or title of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - About Us
                                    totalUrls:
                                      type: number
                                      description: >-
                                        Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                        entire tree
                                      examples:

                                    lastUpdated:

                                      description: >-

                                        crawled
                                      examples:

                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        visited (null if never visited)

                                    error:

                                    A node in the site map tree representing a
                                    webpage and its children
                                  examples:
                                    - url: https://example.com/about
                                      rootUrl: https://example.com
                                      name: About Us
                                      totalUrls: 150
                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                      lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                      metadata:
                                        title: About Us - Example Company
                                        description: >-
                                          Learn more about our company history and
                                          mission.
                                        language: en
                                        canonical: https://example.com/about
                                        robots: index,follow
                                        author: Example Company
                                        keywords:
                                          - about
                                          - company
                                          - history
                                        favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                                        ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                        ogDescription: >-
                                          Learn more about our company history and
                                          mission.
                                        ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
                                        ogUrl: https://example.com/about
                                        twitterCard: summary_large_image
                                        twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                        twitterDescription: >-
                                          Learn more about our company history and
                                          mission.
                                        twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                                        isIframeAllowed: true
                                      extractedLinks:
                                        internal:
                                          - https://example.com/about/team
                                          - https://example.com/about/history
                                          - https://example.com/contact
                                        external:
                                          - https://partner-company.com
                                          - https://industry-association.org
                                        media:
                                          images:
                                            - >-
                                              https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                                            - >-
                                              https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                                          videos:
                                            - >-
                                              https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                                          documents:
                                            - >-
                                              https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
                                      children:
                                        - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                          name: Our Team
                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                          children: []
                                        - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                          name: Company History
                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                          children:
                                            - url: >-
                                                https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                              name: Company Founding
                                              lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                              children: []
                                title: LinksTree
                                description: >-
                                  Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                  representing a page found under this URL. This
                                  creates a recursive tree structure for the
                                  entire website hierarchy.
                                examples:
                                  - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                    name: Team
                                    lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                    children: []
                                  - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                    name: History
                                    lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                    children:
                                      - url: >-
                                          https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                        name: Company Founding
                                        lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                            required:
                              - url
                              - lastUpdated
                            title: LinksTree
                            description: >-
                              LinksTree - Partial site map tree if available, or
                              undefined if no tree could be generated
                        required:
                          - requestId
                          - success
                          - targetUrl
                          - timestamp
                          - error
                        title: LinksErrorResponse
                        description: Error response from the links extraction operation
                        examples:
                          - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                            success: false
                            requestUrl: https://example.com/article#fragment
                            targetUrl: https://example.com
                            timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                            error: 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
  /logs:
    get:
      operationId: logs.getOne
      summary: Get a single activity log
      description: |-
        Endpoint: GET `api.deepcrawl.dev/logs?id={requestId}`

        Retrieve a single activity log with original response by ID.
      tags:
        - Activity Logs
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            description: Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log entry
          allowEmptyValue: true
          allowReserved: true
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                anyOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                        description: >-
                          Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity log
                          entry
                      path:
                        const: read-getMarkdown
                      success:
                        type: boolean
                      requestOptions:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          url:
                            type: string
                            description: The URL to read and extract content from
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com
                              - example.com
                          cacheOptions:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
                            description: >-
                              Cache configuration for read operation based on KV
                              put options except for `metadata`
                            examples:
                              - enabled: true
                                expirationTtl: 172800
                          cleaningProcessor:
                            enum:
                              - cheerio-reader
                              - html-rewriter
                            default: cheerio-reader
                            description: The cleaning processor to use.
                            examples:
                              - cheerio-reader
                              - html-rewriter
                          markdownConverterOptions:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              preferNativeParser:
                                type: boolean
                                default: false
                                title: Prefer Native Parser
                                description: >-
                                  Use native window DOMParser when available
                                  instead of fallback parser (default: false)
                                examples:
                                  - false
                                  - true
                              codeFence:
                                type: string
                                default: '```'
                                title: Code Fence
                                description: >-
                                  Characters used to wrap code blocks (default:
                                  "```")
                                examples:
                                  - '```'
                                  - ~~~
                              bulletMarker:
                                type: string
                                default: '*'
                                title: Bullet Marker
                                description: Character used for unordered list items
                                examples:
                                  - '*'
                                  - '-'
                                  - +
                              codeBlockStyle:
                                enum:
                                  - indented
                                  - fenced
                                default: fenced
                                title: Code Block Style
                                description: >-
                                  How to format code blocks - either indented (4
                                  spaces) or fenced (with code fence characters)
                                examples:
                                  - fenced
                                  - indented
                              emDelimiter:
                                type: string
                                default: _
                                title: Emphasis Delimiter
                                description: >-
                                  Characters used to wrap emphasized (italic)
                                  text (default: _)
                                examples:
                                  - _
                                  - '*'
                              strongDelimiter:
                                type: string
                                default: '**'
                                title: Strong Delimiter
                                description: >-
                                  Characters used to wrap strong (bold) text
                                  (default: **)
                                examples:
                                  - '**'
                                  - __
                              strikeDelimiter:
                                type: string
                                default: ~~
                                title: Strike Delimiter
                                description: >-
                                  Characters used to wrap strikethrough text
                                  (default: ~~)
                                examples:
                                  - ~~
                              ignore:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: string
                                title: Ignore Elements
                                description: >-
                                  HTML elements to completely ignore (including
                                  their content) during conversion
                                examples:
                                  - - script
                                    - style
                                  - - nav
                                    - footer
                              blockElements:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: string
                                title: Block Elements
                                description: >-
                                  HTML elements to treat as block elements
                                  (surrounded with blank lines)
                                examples:
                                  - - div
                                    - section
                                  - - article
                                    - aside
                              maxConsecutiveNewlines:
                                type: integer
                                minimum: -9007199254740991
                                maximum: 9007199254740991
                                exclusiveMinimum: 0
                                default: 3
                                title: Max Consecutive Newlines
                                description: >-
                                  Maximum number of consecutive newlines to
                                  preserve in output
                                examples:
                                  - 3
                                  - 2
                                  - 1
                              lineStartEscape:
                                type: array
                                prefixItems:
                                  - not: {}
                                  - type: string
                                title: Line Start Escape
                                description: >-
                                  Pattern and replacement for escaping special
                                  characters at line start
                                examples:
                                  - - /^(\d+\.)/
                                    - \$1
                              globalEscape:
                                type: array
                                prefixItems:
                                  - not: {}
                                  - type: string
                                title: Global Escape
                                description: >-
                                  Pattern and replacement for escaping special
                                  characters globally
                                examples:
                                  - - /([*_`])/g
                                    - \$1
                              textReplace:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: array
                                  prefixItems:
                                    - not: {}
                                    - type: string
                                title: Text Replace
                                description: >-
                                  Array of pattern-replacement pairs for custom
                                  text transformations
                                examples:
                                  - - - /\s+/g
                                      - ' '
                                  - - - /&nbsp;/g
                                      - ' '
                                    - - /&amp;/g
                                      - '&'
                              keepDataImages:
                                type: boolean
                                default: false
                                title: Keep Data Images
                                description: >-
                                  Whether to preserve images with data: URIs
                                  (can be up to 1MB each) (default: false)
                                examples:
                                  - false
                                  - true
                              useLinkReferenceDefinitions:
                                type: boolean
                                default: false
                                title: Use Link Reference Definitions
                                description: >-
                                  Format links using reference definitions at
                                  bottom instead of inline (default: false)
                                examples:
                                  - false
                                  - true
                              useInlineLinks:
                                type: boolean
                                default: true
                                title: Use Inline Links
                                description: >-
                                  Wrap URL text in <> instead of []() syntax
                                  when text matches URL (default: true)
                                examples:
                                  - true
                                  - false
                            default:
                              preferNativeParser: false
                              codeFence: '```'
                              bulletMarker: '*'
                              codeBlockStyle: fenced
                              emDelimiter: _
                              strongDelimiter: '**'
                              strikeDelimiter: ~~
                              maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                              keepDataImages: false
                              useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                              useInlineLinks: true
                            title: MarkdownConverterOptions
                            description: Options for markdown conversion.
                            examples:
                              - preferNativeParser: false
                                codeFence: '```'
                                bulletMarker: '*'
                                codeBlockStyle: fenced
                                emDelimiter: _
                                strongDelimiter: '**'
                                strikeDelimiter: ~~
                                maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                                keepDataImages: false
                                useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                                useInlineLinks: true
                        required:
                          - url
                      response:
                        anyOf:
                          - type: string
                          - $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadErrorResponse'
                      requestTimestamp:
                        type: string
                        description: Request timestamp for getMarkdown
                        examples:
                          - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                    required:
                      - id
                      - path
                      - success
                      - requestOptions
                      - requestTimestamp
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                        description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
                      path:
                        const: read-readUrl
                      success:
                        type: boolean
                      requestOptions:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          url:
                            type: string
                            description: The URL to read and extract content from
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com
                              - example.com
                          markdown:
                            type: boolean
                            default: true
                            description: Whether to extract markdown from the page.
                            examples:
                              - true
                              - false
                          rawHtml:
                            type: boolean
                            default: false
                            description: Whether to return raw HTML.
                            examples:
