                                                                      - >-

                          - type: object
                            properties:
                              requestId:
                                type: string
                                description: >-
                                  Unique identifier (request ID) for the
                                  activity log entry
                                examples:
                                  - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                              success:
                                const: false
                                description: Indicates that the operation failed
                                examples:
                                  - false
                              requestUrl:
                                type: string
                                description: >-
                                  The URL, raw url, that was requested to be
                                  processed and might be different from the
                                  target url
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com/article#fragment
                              targetUrl:
                                type: string
                                description: >-
                                  The URL that was being processed when the
                                  error occurred
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com/article
                              timestamp:
                                type: string
                                description: ISO timestamp when the error occurred
                                examples:
                                  - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                              error:
                                type: string
                                description: Error message describing what went wrong
                                examples:
                                  - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'

                                type: object
                                properties:

                                      - type: 'null'
                                    description: >-

                                      visited (null if never visited)

                                  error:
                                    type: string
                                    description: >-
                                      Error message if there was an issue

                                    examples:
                                      - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'

                                title: LinksTree
                                description: >-
                                  LinksTree - Partial site map tree if
                                  available, or undefined if no tree could be
                                  generated
                            required:
                              - requestId
                              - success
                              - targetUrl
                              - timestamp
                              - error
                            title: LinksErrorResponse
                            description: Error response from the links extraction operation
                            examples:
                              - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                                success: false
                                requestUrl: https://example.com/article#fragment
                                targetUrl: https://example.com
                                timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                error: 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                      error:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          requestId:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity
                              log entry
                            examples:
                              - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                          success:
                            const: false
                            description: Indicates that the operation failed
                            examples:
                              - false
                          requestUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              The URL, raw url, that was requested to be
                              processed and might be different from the target
                              url
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/article#fragment
                          targetUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              The URL that was being processed when the error
                              occurred
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/article
                          timestamp:
                            type: string
                            description: ISO timestamp when the error occurred
                            examples:
                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                          error:
                            type: string
                            description: Error message describing what went wrong
                            examples:
                              - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                          tree:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              url:
                                type: string
                                description: The URL of this page
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com/about
                              rootUrl:
                                type: string
                                description: The root URL of the website being crawled
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com
                              name:
                                type: string
                                description: The display name or title of this page
                                examples:
                                  - About Us
                              totalUrls:
                                type: number
                                description: >-
                                  Total number of URLs discovered in the entire
                                  tree
                                examples:
                                  - 150
                              lastUpdated:
                                type: string
                                description: ISO timestamp when this page was last crawled
                                examples:
                                  - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                              lastVisited:
                                anyOf:
                                  - type: string
                                  - type: 'null'
                                description: >-
                                  ISO timestamp when this page was last visited
                                  (null if never visited)
                                examples:
                                  - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                              error:
                                type: string
                                description: >-
                                  Error message if there was an issue processing
                                  this page
                                examples:
                                  - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                              metadata:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                title: PageMetadata
                                description: >-
                                  Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                  description, etc.)
                              cleanedHtml:
                                type: string
                                description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                              extractedLinks:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                title: ExtractedLinks
                                description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
                              skippedUrls:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                title: SkippedLinks
                                description: >-
                                  URLs that were skipped during processing with
                                  reasons
                              children:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    url:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The URL of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com/about
                                    rootUrl:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        The root URL of the website being
                                        crawled
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com
                                    name:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The display name or title of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - About Us
                                    totalUrls:
                                      type: number
                                      description: >-
                                        Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                        entire tree
                                      examples:
                                        - 150
                                    lastUpdated:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        crawled
                                      examples:
                                        - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                    lastVisited:
                                      anyOf:
                                        - type: string
                                        - type: 'null'
                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        visited (null if never visited)
                                      examples:
                                        - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                    error:
                                      type: string

                                        Error message if there was an issue
                                        processing this page
                                      examples:
                                        - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'

                                                  title: SkippedLinks
                                                  description: >-
                                                    URLs that were skipped during processing
                                                    with reasons
                                                children:
                                                  type: array
                                                  items:
                                                    type: object
                                                    properties:
                                                      url: {}
                                                      rootUrl: {}
                                                      name: {}
                                                      totalUrls: {}
                                                      lastUpdated: {}
                                                      lastVisited: {}
                                                      error: {}
                                                      metadata: {}
                                                      cleanedHtml: {}
                                                      extractedLinks: {}
                                                      skippedUrls: {}
                                                      children: {}
                                                    title: LinksTree
                                                    description: >-
                                                      A node in the site map tree representing
                                                      a webpage and its children
                                                    examples:
                                                      - url: https://example.com/about
                                                        rootUrl: https://example.com
                                                        name: About Us
                                                        totalUrls: 150
                                                        lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                        lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                        metadata:
                                                          title: About Us - Example Company
                                                          description: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          language: en
                                                          canonical: https://example.com/about
                                                          robots: index,follow
                                                          author: Example Company
                                                          keywords:
                                                            - about
                                                            - company
                                                            - history
                                                          favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                                                          ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                          ogDescription: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
                                                          ogUrl: https://example.com/about
                                                          twitterCard: summary_large_image
                                                          twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                          twitterDescription: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                                                          isIframeAllowed: true
                                                        extractedLinks:
                                                          internal:
                                                            - https://example.com/about/team
                                                            - https://example.com/about/history
                                                            - https://example.com/contact
                                                          external:
                                                            - https://partner-company.com
                                                            - https://industry-association.org
                                                          media:
                                                            images:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                                                            videos:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                                                            documents:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
                                                        children:
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                            name: Our Team
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                            children: []
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                            name: Company History
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                            children:
                                                              - url: >-
                                                                  https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                                name: Company Founding
                                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                                                children: []
                                                  title: LinksTree
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                                    representing a page found under this
                                                    URL. This creates a recursive tree
                                                    structure for the entire website
                                                    hierarchy.
                                                  examples:
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                      name: Team
                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                      children: []
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                      name: History
                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'

                                                        - url: >-
                                                            https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                          name: Company Founding
                                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'

                                        title: About Us - Example Company

                                title: LinksTree
                                description: >-
                                  Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                  representing a page found under this URL. This
                                  creates a recursive tree structure for the
                                  entire website hierarchy.
                                examples:
                                  - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                    name: Team
                                    lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                    children: []
                                  - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                    name: History
                                    lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                    children:
                                      - url: >-
                                          https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                        name: Company Founding
                                        lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                            required:
                              - url
                              - lastUpdated
                            title: LinksTree
                            description: >-
                              LinksTree - Partial site map tree if available, or
                              undefined if no tree could be generated
                        required:
                          - requestId
                          - success
                          - targetUrl
                          - timestamp
                          - error
                        title: LinksErrorResponse
                        description: Error response from the links extraction operation
                        examples:
                          - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                            success: false
                            requestUrl: https://example.com/article#fragment
                            targetUrl: https://example.com
                            timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                            error: 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                      requestTimestamp:
                        type: string
                        description: Request timestamp for getLinks
                        examples:
                          - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                    required:
                      - id
                      - path
                      - success
                      - requestOptions
                      - requestTimestamp
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      id:
                        type: string
                        description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
                      path:
                        const: links-extractLinks
                      success:
                        type: boolean
                      requestOptions:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          url:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              The URL to extract links from. Must be a valid URL
                              string.
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com
                              - example.com
                          tree:
                            type: boolean
                            default: true
                            description: 'Whether to build a site map tree. Default: true'
                            examples:
                              - true
                              - false
                          linkExtractionOptions:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinkExtractionOptions'
                            title: LinkExtractionOptions
                            description: >-
                              Options for link extraction. Default: [object
                              Object]
                            examples:
                              - includeExternal: false
                                includeMedia: false
                                removeQueryParams: true
                          cacheOptions:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
                            description: >-
                              Cache configuration for links operation based on
                              KV put options except for `metadata`
                            examples:
                              - enabled: true
                                expirationTtl: 172800
                          metricsOptions:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              enable:
                                type: boolean
                                default: true
                                description: Whether to enable metrics.
                                examples:
                                  - true
                                  - false
                            default:
                              enable: true
                            description: Options for metrics for links operation.
                            examples:
                              - enable: true
                              - false
                          folderFirst:
                            type: boolean
                            default: true
                            description: >-
                              Whether to place folders before leaf nodes in the
                              tree. Default: true
                            examples:
                              - true
                              - false
                          linksOrder:
                            enum:
                              - page
                              - alphabetical
                            default: page
                            description: >-
                              How to order links within each folder: "page"
                              (preserve original order) or "alphabetical" (sort
                              A→Z by URL). Default: page
                            examples:
                              - alphabetical
                              - page
                          extractedLinks:
                            type: boolean
                            default: true
                            description: >-
                              Whether to include extracted links for each node
                              in the tree. Default: true
                            examples:
                              - true
                              - false
                          subdomainAsRootUrl:
                            type: boolean
                            default: true
                            description: >-
                              Whether to treat subdomain as root URL. If false,
                              subdomain will be excluded from root URL. e.g., if
                              false: rootUrl: `https://swr.vercel.app` ->
                              `https://vercel.app`. Default: true
                            examples:
                              - true
                              - false
                          isPlatformUrl:
                            type: boolean
                            default: false
                            description: >-
                              Whether the URL is a platform URL. If true, the
                              targetUrl will be the platform URL. e.g., if true:
                              targetUrl: `https://github.com` ->
                              `https://github.com/lumpinif`. Default: false
                            examples:
                              - false
                              - true
                          metadata:
                            type: boolean
                            default: true
                            description: Whether to extract metadata from the page.
                            examples:
                              - true
                              - false
                          cleanedHtml:
                            type: boolean
                            default: false
                            description: Whether to return cleaned HTML.
                            examples:
                              - false
                              - true
                          robots:
                            type: boolean
                            default: false
                            description: Whether to fetch and parse robots.txt.
                            examples:
                              - false
                              - true
                          sitemapXML:
                            type: boolean
                            default: false
                            description: >-
                              ( NOTE: sitemapXML is not stable yet, please use
                              with caution. It may not work as expected. )
                              Whether to fetch and parse sitemap.xml.
                            examples:
                              - false
                              - true
                          metadataOptions:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MetadataOptions'
                            description: Options for metadata extraction.
                            examples:
                              - title: true
                                description: true
                                language: true
                                canonical: true
                                robots: true
                                author: true
                                keywords: true
                                favicon: true
                                openGraph: true
                                twitter: true
                          cleaningProcessor:
                            enum:
                              - cheerio-reader
                              - html-rewriter
                            default: cheerio-reader
                            description: The cleaning processor to use.
                            examples:
                              - cheerio-reader
                              - html-rewriter
                          htmlRewriterOptions:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/HTMLRewriterOptions'
                            description: Options for HTML cleaning with html-rewriter.
                            examples:
                              - extractMainContent: true
                                removeBase64Images: true
                          readerCleaningOptions:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              cheerioOptions:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  baseURI:
                                    anyOf:
                                      - type: string
                                      - not: {}
                                    description: >-
                                      The base URI for the document. Used to
                                      resolve href and src props.
                                    examples:
                                      - https://example.com
                                  onParseError:
                                    anyOf:
                                      - type: 'null'
                                      - {}
                                    description: Callback for parse errors.
                                    examples:
                                      - null
                                  pseudos:
                                    type: object
                                    propertyNames:
                                      type: string
                                    additionalProperties:
                                      anyOf:
                                        - type: string
                                        - {}
                                    description: >-
                                      Extension point for pseudo-classes. Maps
                                      from names to either strings or functions.
                                    examples:
                                      - foo: div.foo
                                  quirksMode:
                                    type: boolean
                                    description: >-
                                      Is the document in quirks mode? This will
                                      lead to .className and #id being
                                      case-insensitive.
                                    examples:
                                      - false
                                  scriptingEnabled:
                                    type: boolean
                                    description: >-
                                      The scripting flag. If set to true,
                                      noscript element content will be parsed as
                                      text.
                                    examples:
                                      - true
                                  sourceCodeLocationInfo:
                                    type: boolean
                                    description: >-
                                      Enables source code location information.
                                      When enabled, each node will have a
                                      sourceCodeLocation property.
                                    examples:
                                      - false
                                  treeAdapter:
                                    description: Specifies the resulting tree format.
                                  xml:
                                    anyOf:
                                      - type: boolean
                                      - type: object
                                        propertyNames:
                                          type: string
                                        additionalProperties: {}
                                    description: >-
                                      Recommended way of configuring htmlparser2
                                      when wanting to parse XML.
                                    examples:
                                      - false
                                      - true
                                title: CheerioOptions
                                description: >-
                                  Configuration options for Cheerio.
                                  Parser-specific options are only recognized if
                                  the relevant parser is used.
                                examples:
                                  - baseURI: https://example.com
                                    quirksMode: false
                                    scriptingEnabled: true
                                  - xml: true
                                    sourceCodeLocationInfo: true
                                    pseudos:
                                      foo: div.foo
                                default: {}
                              readerOptions:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  debug:
                                    type: boolean
                                    description: Whether to enable logging.
                                    examples:
                                      - false
                                  maxElemsToParse:
                                    type: number
                                    description: >-
                                      The maximum number of elements to parse. 0
                                      means no limit.
                                    examples:
                                      - 0
                                      - 1000
                                  nbTopCandidates:
                                    type: number
                                    description: >-
                                      The number of top candidates to consider
                                      when analysing competition among
                                      candidates.
                                    examples:
                                      - 5
                                      - 10
                                  charThreshold:
                                    type: number
                                    description: >-
                                      The minimum number of characters an
                                      article must have to return a result.
                                    examples:
                                      - 500
                                      - 300
                                      - 1000
                                  keepClasses:
                                    type: boolean
                                    description: >-
                                      Whether to preserve all classes on HTML
                                      elements. When false, only
                                      classesToPreserve are kept.
                                    examples:
                                      - false
                                      - true
                                  classesToPreserve:
                                    type: array
                                    items:
                                      type: string
                                    description: >-
                                      Classes to preserve on HTML elements when
                                      keepClasses is false.
                                    examples:
                                      - - article
                                        - content
                                      - - post-body
                                        - main-content
                                  disableJSONLD:
                                    type: boolean
                                    description: >-
                                      Whether to skip JSON-LD parsing when
                                      extracting page metadata.
                                    examples:
                                      - false
                                      - true
                                  allowedVideoRegex:
                                    not: {}
                                    description: >-
                                      Regular expression for video URLs allowed
                                      in article content.
                                  linkDensityModifier:
                                    type: number
                                    description: >-
                                      Number added to base link density
                                      threshold during shadiness checks.
                                    examples:
                                      - 0
                                      - -0.1
                                      - 0.2
                                  extraction:
                                    type: boolean
                                    description: >-
                                      Whether to perform full extraction. When
                                      false, content/textContent/length/excerpt
                                      will be null.
                                    examples:
                                      - true
                                      - false
                                  baseURI:
                                    type: string
                                    description: Base URI for resolving relative URLs.
                                    examples:
                                      - https://example.com
                                      - https://blog.example.com/posts/
                                title: ReaderOptions
                                description: >-
                                  Configuration options for the Readability
                                  library. All options are optional.
                                examples:
                                  - debug: false
                                    maxElemsToParse: 0
                                    nbTopCandidates: 5
                                    charThreshold: 500
                                    keepClasses: false
                                    extraction: true
                                  - charThreshold: 300
                                    keepClasses: true
                                    extraction: false
                                    baseURI: https://example.com
                                default: {}
                            default:
                              cheerioOptions: {}
                              readerOptions: {}
                            description: Options for HTML cleaning with cheerio-reader.
                            examples:
                              - readerOptions:
                                  debug: true
                          fetchOptions:
                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/FetchOptions'
                            description: Options for the fetch request.
                            examples:
                              - method: GET
                                headers:
                                  User-Agent: Deepcrawl-Bot/1.0 (+https://deepcrawl.dev)
                                  Accept: >-
                                    text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
                                  Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
                                redirect: follow
                        required:
                          - url
                        title: LinksOptions
                        description: Configuration options for links extraction operation
                        examples:
                          - url: https://example.com
                            tree: true
                      response:
                        anyOf:
                          - anyOf:
                              - type: object
                                properties:
                                  success:
                                    const: true
                                    description: >-
                                      Indicates that the operation was
                                      successful
                                    examples:
                                      - true
                                  targetUrl:
                                    type: string
                                    description: The URL that was requested to be processed
                                    examples:
                                      - https://example.com
                                  timestamp:
                                    type: string
                                    description: >-
                                      ISO timestamp when the request was
                                      processed
                                    examples:
                                      - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                  requestId:
                                    type: string
                                    description: >-
                                      Unique identifier (request ID) for the
                                      activity log entry
                                    examples:
                                      - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                                  cached:
                                    type: boolean
                                    description: Whether the result was returned from cache
                                    examples:
                                      - false
                                  ancestors:
                                    type: array
                                    items:
                                      type: string
                                    description: Array of parent URLs leading to this URL
                                    examples:
                                      - https://example.com
                                  metrics:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      readableDuration:
                                        type: string
                                        description: >-
                                          Human-readable representation of the
                                          operation duration
                                        examples:
                                          - 0.2s
                                      durationMs:
                                        type: number
                                        description: >-
                                          Duration of the operation in
                                          milliseconds
                                        examples:
                                          - 200
                                      startTimeMs:
                                        type: number
                                        description: >-
                                          Timestamp in milliseconds when the
                                          operation started
                                        examples:
                                          - 1704067800000
                                      endTimeMs:
                                        type: number
                                        description: >-
                                          Timestamp in milliseconds when the
                                          operation finished
                                        examples:
                                          - 1704067800200
                                    required:
                                      - readableDuration
                                      - durationMs
                                      - startTimeMs
                                      - endTimeMs
                                    title: Metrics
                                    description: Metrics for the links extraction operation
                                    examples:
                                      - readableDuration: 0.2s
                                        durationMs: 200
                                        startTimeMs: 1704067800000
                                        endTimeMs: 1704067800200
                                  tree:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      url:
                                        type: string
                                        description: The URL of this page
                                        examples:
                                          - https://example.com/about
                                      rootUrl:
                                        type: string
                                        description: >-
                                          The root URL of the website being
                                          crawled
                                        examples:
                                          - https://example.com
                                      name:
                                        type: string
                                        description: The display name or title of this page
                                        examples:
                                          - About Us
                                      totalUrls:
                                        type: number
                                        description: >-
                                          Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                          entire tree
                                        examples:
                                          - 150
                                      lastUpdated:
                                        type: string
                                        description: >-
                                          ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                          crawled
                                        examples:
                                          - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                      lastVisited:
                                        anyOf:
                                          - type: string
                                          - type: 'null'
                                        description: >-
                                          ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                          visited (null if never visited)
                                        examples:
                                          - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                      error:
                                        type: string
                                        description: >-
                                          Error message if there was an issue
                                          processing this page
                                        examples:
                                          - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                      metadata:
                                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                        title: PageMetadata
                                        description: >-
                                          Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                          description, etc.)
                                      cleanedHtml:
                                        type: string
                                        description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                      extractedLinks:
                                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                        title: ExtractedLinks
                                        description: >-
                                          Links found on this page, categorized by
                                          type
                                      skippedUrls:
                                        $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                        title: SkippedLinks
                                        description: >-
                                          URLs that were skipped during processing
                                          with reasons

                                              type: string
                                              description: The URL of this page
                                              examples:

                                                            title: LinksTree
                                                            description: >-
                                                              A node in the site map tree representing
                                                              a webpage and its children

                                                                name: About Us

                                                                lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                                metadata:
                                                                  title: About Us - Example Company
                                                                  description: >-
                                                                    Learn more about our company history and
                                                                    mission.
                                                                  language: en
                                                                  canonical: https://example.com/about
                                                                  robots: index,follow
                                                                  author: Example Company
                                                                  keywords:
                                                                    - about
                                                                    - company
                                                                    - history
                                                                  favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                                                                  ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                                  ogDescription: >-

                                                                    mission.

                                                                  ogUrl: https://example.com/about

                                                                  twitterDescription: >-
                                                                    Learn more about our company history and
                                                                    mission.
                                                                  twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                                                                  isIframeAllowed: true
                                                                extractedLinks:
                                                                  internal:
                                                                    - https://example.com/about/team
                                                                    - https://example.com/about/history
                                                                    - https://example.com/contact

                                                                    - https://industry-association.org

                                          metadata:

                                            internal:

                                                - >-

                                            - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                              name: Our Team

                                    title: LinksTree

                                title: LinksTree
                                description: >-
                                  LinksTree - Partial site map tree if
                                  available, or undefined if no tree could be
                                  generated
                            required:
                              - requestId
                              - success
                              - targetUrl
                              - timestamp
                              - error
                            title: LinksErrorResponse
                            description: Error response from the links extraction operation
                            examples:
                              - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                                success: false
                                requestUrl: https://example.com/article#fragment
                                targetUrl: https://example.com
                                timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                error: 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                      error:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          requestId:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity
                              log entry
                            examples:
                              - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                          success:
                            const: false
                            description: Indicates that the operation failed
                            examples:
                              - false
                          requestUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              The URL, raw url, that was requested to be
                              processed and might be different from the target
                              url
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/article#fragment
                          targetUrl:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              The URL that was being processed when the error
                              occurred
                            examples:
                              - https://example.com/article
                          timestamp:
                            type: string
                            description: ISO timestamp when the error occurred
                            examples:
                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                          error:
                            type: string
                            description: Error message describing what went wrong
                            examples:
                              - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                          tree:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              url:
                                type: string
                                description: The URL of this page
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com/about
                              rootUrl:
                                type: string
                                description: The root URL of the website being crawled
                                examples:
                                  - https://example.com
                              name:
                                type: string
                                description: The display name or title of this page
                                examples:
                                  - About Us
                              totalUrls:
                                type: number
                                description: >-
                                  Total number of URLs discovered in the entire
                                  tree
                                examples:
                                  - 150
                              lastUpdated:
                                type: string
                                description: ISO timestamp when this page was last crawled
                                examples:
                                  - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                              lastVisited:
                                anyOf:
                                  - type: string
                                  - type: 'null'
                                description: >-
                                  ISO timestamp when this page was last visited
                                  (null if never visited)
                                examples:
                                  - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                              error:
                                type: string
                                description: >-
                                  Error message if there was an issue processing
                                  this page
                                examples:
                                  - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                              metadata:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                title: PageMetadata
                                description: >-
                                  Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                  description, etc.)
                              cleanedHtml:
                                type: string
                                description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                              extractedLinks:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                title: ExtractedLinks
                                description: Links found on this page, categorized by type
                              skippedUrls:
                                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                title: SkippedLinks
                                description: >-
                                  URLs that were skipped during processing with
                                  reasons
                              children:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    url:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The URL of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com/about
                                    rootUrl:

                                      description: >-

                                        crawled
                                      examples:

                                      description: >-

                                      description: >-

                                      examples:

                                    lastVisited:

                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        visited (null if never visited)
                                      examples:

                                    error:

                                          images:
                                            - >-
                                              https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                                            - >-
                                              https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                                          videos:
                                            - >-
                                              https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                                          documents:
                                            - >-
                                              https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
                                      children:
                                        - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                          name: Our Team
                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                          children: []
                                        - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                          name: Company History
                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                          children:
                                            - url: >-
                                                https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                              name: Company Founding
                                              lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                              children: []
                                title: LinksTree
                                description: >-
                                  Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                  representing a page found under this URL. This
                                  creates a recursive tree structure for the
                                  entire website hierarchy.
                                examples:
                                  - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                    name: Team
                                    lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                    children: []
                                  - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                    name: History
                                    lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                    children:
                                      - url: >-
                                          https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                        name: Company Founding
                                        lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                            required:
                              - url
                              - lastUpdated
                            title: LinksTree
                            description: >-
                              LinksTree - Partial site map tree if available, or
                              undefined if no tree could be generated
                        required:
                          - requestId
                          - success
                          - targetUrl
                          - timestamp
                          - error
                        title: LinksErrorResponse
                        description: Error response from the links extraction operation
                        examples:
                          - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                            success: false
                            requestUrl: https://example.com/article#fragment
                            targetUrl: https://example.com
                            timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                            error: 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                      requestTimestamp:
                        type: string
                        description: Request timestamp for extractLinks
                        examples:
                          - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                    required:
                      - id
                      - path
                      - success
                      - requestOptions
                      - requestTimestamp
                description: Activity log entry with the response
        '400':
          description: Export format validation failed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: LOGS_INVALID_DATE_RANGE
                      status:
                        const: 400
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Invalid logs date range
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          startDate:
                            type: string
                            description: Start date provided by the caller
                          endDate:
                            type: string
                            description: End date provided by the caller
                          message:
                            type: string
                            default: startDate must be less than or equal to endDate
                            description: >-
                              Human-readable description of the validation
                              failure
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: LOGS_INVALID_SORT
                      status:
                        const: 400
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Invalid logs sort option
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          orderBy:
                            type: string
                            description: Requested sort key that is not supported
                            examples:
                              - responseSize
                          allowed:
                            type: array
                            items:
                              type: string
                            description: List of supported sort keys
                          message:
                            type: string
                            default: Unsupported sort column requested
                            description: >-
                              Human-readable description of the validation
                              failure
                        required:
                          - orderBy
                          - allowed
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: INVALID_EXPORT_FORMAT
                      status:
                        const: 400
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Invalid export format for the requested log
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          id:
                            type: string
                            description: The request ID that was attempted to export
                          path:
                            type: string
                            description: The API path that the request was made to
                            examples:
                              - read-getMarkdown
                              - links-extractLinks
                          format:
                            type: string
                            description: The export format that was requested
                            examples:
                              - json
                              - markdown
                              - links
                          message:
                            type: string
                            description: >-
                              Human-readable description of the export format
                              error
                        required:
                          - id
                          - message
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
        '429':
          description: Rate limit exceeded
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                oneOf:
                  - type: object
                    properties:
                      defined:
                        const: true
                      code:
                        const: RATE_LIMITED
                      status:
                        const: 429
                      message:
                        type: string
                        default: Rate limit exceeded
                      data:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          operation:
                            type: string
                            description: The operation that was rate limited
                            examples:
                              - read GET
                              - read POST
                              - links GET
                              - links POST
                          retryAfter:
                            type: integer
                            minimum: -9007199254740991
                            maximum: 9007199254740991
                            description: The time to retry in seconds
                            examples:
                              - 10
                        required:
                          - operation
                          - retryAfter
                    required:
                      - defined
                      - code
                      - status
                      - message
                      - data
                  - $ref: '#/components/schemas/UndefinedError'
    post:
      operationId: logs.listLogs
      summary: List activity logs
      description: >-
        Endpoint: POST `api.deepcrawl.dev/logs`


        Retrieve activity logs with request options but no response
        reconstruction payload. Returns paginated results with optional
        filtering by path, success status, and date range.
      tags:
        - Activity Logs
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ListLogsOptions'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  logs:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      anyOf:
                        - type: object
                          properties:
                            id:
                              type: string
                              description: >-
                                Unique identifier (request ID) for the activity
                                log entry
                            path:
                              const: read-getMarkdown
                            success:
                              type: boolean
                            requestOptions:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                url:
                                  type: string
                                  description: The URL to read and extract content from
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com
                                    - example.com
                                cacheOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
                                  description: >-
                                    Cache configuration for read operation based
                                    on KV put options except for `metadata`
                                  examples:
                                    - enabled: true
                                      expirationTtl: 172800
                                cleaningProcessor:
                                  enum:
                                    - cheerio-reader
                                    - html-rewriter
                                  default: cheerio-reader
                                  description: The cleaning processor to use.
                                  examples:
                                    - cheerio-reader
                                    - html-rewriter
                                markdownConverterOptions:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    preferNativeParser:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: false
                                      title: Prefer Native Parser
                                      description: >-
                                        Use native window DOMParser when
                                        available instead of fallback parser
                                        (default: false)
                                      examples:
                                        - false
                                        - true
                                    codeFence:
                                      type: string
                                      default: '```'
                                      title: Code Fence
                                      description: >-
                                        Characters used to wrap code blocks
                                        (default: "```")
                                      examples:
                                        - '```'
                                        - ~~~
                                    bulletMarker:
                                      type: string
                                      default: '*'
                                      title: Bullet Marker
