                                      description: Character used for unordered list items
                                      examples:
                                        - '*'
                                        - '-'
                                        - +
                                    codeBlockStyle:
                                      enum:
                                        - indented
                                        - fenced
                                      default: fenced
                                      title: Code Block Style
                                      description: >-
                                        How to format code blocks - either
                                        indented (4 spaces) or fenced (with code
                                        fence characters)
                                      examples:
                                        - fenced
                                        - indented
                                    emDelimiter:
                                      type: string
                                      default: _
                                      title: Emphasis Delimiter
                                      description: >-
                                        Characters used to wrap emphasized
                                        (italic) text (default: _)
                                      examples:
                                        - _
                                        - '*'
                                    strongDelimiter:
                                      type: string
                                      default: '**'
                                      title: Strong Delimiter
                                      description: >-
                                        Characters used to wrap strong (bold)
                                        text (default: **)
                                      examples:
                                        - '**'
                                        - __
                                    strikeDelimiter:
                                      type: string
                                      default: ~~
                                      title: Strike Delimiter
                                      description: >-
                                        Characters used to wrap strikethrough
                                        text (default: ~~)
                                      examples:
                                        - ~~
                                    ignore:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: string
                                      title: Ignore Elements
                                      description: >-
                                        HTML elements to completely ignore
                                        (including their content) during
                                        conversion
                                      examples:
                                        - - script
                                          - style
                                        - - nav
                                          - footer
                                    blockElements:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: string
                                      title: Block Elements
                                      description: >-
                                        HTML elements to treat as block elements
                                        (surrounded with blank lines)
                                      examples:
                                        - - div
                                          - section
                                        - - article
                                          - aside
                                    maxConsecutiveNewlines:
                                      type: integer
                                      minimum: -9007199254740991
                                      maximum: 9007199254740991
                                      exclusiveMinimum: 0
                                      default: 3
                                      title: Max Consecutive Newlines
                                      description: >-
                                        Maximum number of consecutive newlines
                                        to preserve in output
                                      examples:
                                        - 3
                                        - 2
                                        - 1
                                    lineStartEscape:
                                      type: array
                                      prefixItems:
                                        - not: {}
                                        - type: string
                                      title: Line Start Escape
                                      description: >-
                                        Pattern and replacement for escaping
                                        special characters at line start
                                      examples:
                                        - - /^(\d+\.)/
                                          - \$1
                                    globalEscape:
                                      type: array
                                      prefixItems:
                                        - not: {}
                                        - type: string
                                      title: Global Escape
                                      description: >-
                                        Pattern and replacement for escaping
                                        special characters globally
                                      examples:
                                        - - /([*_`])/g
                                          - \$1
                                    textReplace:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: array
                                        prefixItems:
                                          - not: {}
                                          - type: string
                                      title: Text Replace
                                      description: >-
                                        Array of pattern-replacement pairs for
                                        custom text transformations
                                      examples:
                                        - - - /\s+/g
                                            - ' '
                                        - - - /&nbsp;/g
                                            - ' '
                                          - - /&amp;/g
                                            - '&'
                                    keepDataImages:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: false
                                      title: Keep Data Images
                                      description: >-
                                        Whether to preserve images with data:
                                        URIs (can be up to 1MB each) (default:
                                        false)
                                      examples:
                                        - false
                                        - true
                                    useLinkReferenceDefinitions:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: false
                                      title: Use Link Reference Definitions
                                      description: >-
                                        Format links using reference definitions
                                        at bottom instead of inline (default:
                                        false)
                                      examples:
                                        - false
                                        - true
                                    useInlineLinks:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: true
                                      title: Use Inline Links
                                      description: >-
                                        Wrap URL text in <> instead of []()
                                        syntax when text matches URL (default:
                                        true)
                                      examples:
                                        - true
                                        - false
                                  default:
                                    preferNativeParser: false
                                    codeFence: '```'
                                    bulletMarker: '*'
                                    codeBlockStyle: fenced
                                    emDelimiter: _
                                    strongDelimiter: '**'
                                    strikeDelimiter: ~~
                                    maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                                    keepDataImages: false
                                    useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                                    useInlineLinks: true
                                  title: MarkdownConverterOptions
                                  description: Options for markdown conversion.
                                  examples:
                                    - preferNativeParser: false
                                      codeFence: '```'
                                      bulletMarker: '*'
                                      codeBlockStyle: fenced
                                      emDelimiter: _
                                      strongDelimiter: '**'
                                      strikeDelimiter: ~~
                                      maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                                      keepDataImages: false
                                      useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                                      useInlineLinks: true
                              required:
                                - url
                            requestTimestamp:
                              type: string
                              description: Request timestamp for getMarkdown
                              examples:
                                - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                          required:
                            - id
                            - path
                            - success
                            - requestOptions
                            - requestTimestamp
                        - type: object
                          properties:
                            id:
                              type: string
                              description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
                            path:
                              const: read-readUrl
                            success:
                              type: boolean
                            requestOptions:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                url:
                                  type: string
                                  description: The URL to read and extract content from
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com
                                    - example.com
                                markdown:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: Whether to extract markdown from the page.
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                rawHtml:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: Whether to return raw HTML.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                cacheOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
                                  description: >-
                                    Cache configuration for read operation based
                                    on KV put options except for `metadata`
                                  examples:
                                    - enabled: true
                                      expirationTtl: 172800
                                markdownConverterOptions:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    preferNativeParser:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: false
                                      title: Prefer Native Parser
                                      description: >-
                                        Use native window DOMParser when
                                        available instead of fallback parser
                                        (default: false)
                                      examples:
                                        - false
                                        - true
                                    codeFence:
                                      type: string
                                      default: '```'
                                      title: Code Fence
                                      description: >-
                                        Characters used to wrap code blocks
                                        (default: "```")
                                      examples:
                                        - '```'
                                        - ~~~
                                    bulletMarker:
                                      type: string
                                      default: '*'
                                      title: Bullet Marker
                                      description: Character used for unordered list items
                                      examples:
                                        - '*'
                                        - '-'
                                        - +
                                    codeBlockStyle:
                                      enum:
                                        - indented
                                        - fenced
                                      default: fenced
                                      title: Code Block Style
                                      description: >-
                                        How to format code blocks - either
                                        indented (4 spaces) or fenced (with code
                                        fence characters)
                                      examples:
                                        - fenced
                                        - indented
                                    emDelimiter:
                                      type: string
                                      default: _
                                      title: Emphasis Delimiter
                                      description: >-
                                        Characters used to wrap emphasized
                                        (italic) text (default: _)
                                      examples:
                                        - _
                                        - '*'
                                    strongDelimiter:
                                      type: string
                                      default: '**'
                                      title: Strong Delimiter
                                      description: >-
                                        Characters used to wrap strong (bold)
                                        text (default: **)
                                      examples:
                                        - '**'
                                        - __
                                    strikeDelimiter:
                                      type: string
                                      default: ~~
                                      title: Strike Delimiter
                                      description: >-
                                        Characters used to wrap strikethrough
                                        text (default: ~~)
                                      examples:
                                        - ~~
                                    ignore:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: string
                                      title: Ignore Elements
                                      description: >-
                                        HTML elements to completely ignore
                                        (including their content) during
                                        conversion
                                      examples:
                                        - - script
                                          - style
                                        - - nav
                                          - footer
                                    blockElements:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: string
                                      title: Block Elements
                                      description: >-
                                        HTML elements to treat as block elements
                                        (surrounded with blank lines)
                                      examples:
                                        - - div
                                          - section
                                        - - article
                                          - aside
                                    maxConsecutiveNewlines:
                                      type: integer
                                      minimum: -9007199254740991
                                      maximum: 9007199254740991
                                      exclusiveMinimum: 0
                                      default: 3
                                      title: Max Consecutive Newlines
                                      description: >-
                                        Maximum number of consecutive newlines
                                        to preserve in output
                                      examples:
                                        - 3
                                        - 2
                                        - 1
                                    lineStartEscape:
                                      type: array
                                      prefixItems:
                                        - not: {}
                                        - type: string
                                      title: Line Start Escape
                                      description: >-
                                        Pattern and replacement for escaping
                                        special characters at line start
                                      examples:
                                        - - /^(\d+\.)/
                                          - \$1
                                    globalEscape:
                                      type: array
                                      prefixItems:
                                        - not: {}
                                        - type: string
                                      title: Global Escape
                                      description: >-
                                        Pattern and replacement for escaping
                                        special characters globally
                                      examples:
                                        - - /([*_`])/g
                                          - \$1
                                    textReplace:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: array
                                        prefixItems:
                                          - not: {}
                                          - type: string
                                      title: Text Replace
                                      description: >-
                                        Array of pattern-replacement pairs for
                                        custom text transformations
                                      examples:
                                        - - - /\s+/g
                                            - ' '
                                        - - - /&nbsp;/g
                                            - ' '
                                          - - /&amp;/g
                                            - '&'
                                    keepDataImages:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: false
                                      title: Keep Data Images
                                      description: >-
                                        Whether to preserve images with data:
                                        URIs (can be up to 1MB each) (default:
                                        false)
                                      examples:
                                        - false
                                        - true
                                    useLinkReferenceDefinitions:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: false
                                      title: Use Link Reference Definitions
                                      description: >-
                                        Format links using reference definitions
                                        at bottom instead of inline (default:
                                        false)
                                      examples:
                                        - false
                                        - true
                                    useInlineLinks:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: true
                                      title: Use Inline Links
                                      description: >-
                                        Wrap URL text in <> instead of []()
                                        syntax when text matches URL (default:
                                        true)
                                      examples:
                                        - true
                                        - false
                                  default:
                                    preferNativeParser: false
                                    codeFence: '```'
                                    bulletMarker: '*'
                                    codeBlockStyle: fenced
                                    emDelimiter: _
                                    strongDelimiter: '**'
                                    strikeDelimiter: ~~
                                    maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                                    keepDataImages: false
                                    useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                                    useInlineLinks: true
                                  title: MarkdownConverterOptions
                                  description: Options for markdown conversion.
                                  examples:
                                    - preferNativeParser: false
                                      codeFence: '```'
                                      bulletMarker: '*'
                                      codeBlockStyle: fenced
                                      emDelimiter: _
                                      strongDelimiter: '**'
                                      strikeDelimiter: ~~
                                      maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                                      keepDataImages: false
                                      useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                                      useInlineLinks: true
                                metricsOptions:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    enable:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: true
                                      description: Whether to enable metrics.
                                      examples:
                                        - true
                                        - false
                                  default:
                                    enable: true
                                  description: Options for metrics.
                                  examples:
                                    - enable: true
                                    - false
                                metadata:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: Whether to extract metadata from the page.
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                cleanedHtml:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: Whether to return cleaned HTML.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                robots:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: Whether to fetch and parse robots.txt.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                sitemapXML:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: >-
                                    ( NOTE: sitemapXML is not stable yet, please
                                    use with caution. It may not work as
                                    expected. ) Whether to fetch and parse
                                    sitemap.xml.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                metadataOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/MetadataOptions'
                                  description: Options for metadata extraction.
                                  examples:
                                    - title: true
                                      description: true
                                      language: true
                                      canonical: true
                                      robots: true
                                      author: true
                                      keywords: true
                                      favicon: true
                                      openGraph: true
                                      twitter: true
                                cleaningProcessor:
                                  enum:
                                    - cheerio-reader
                                    - html-rewriter
                                  default: cheerio-reader
                                  description: The cleaning processor to use.
                                  examples:
                                    - cheerio-reader
                                    - html-rewriter
                                htmlRewriterOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/HTMLRewriterOptions'
                                  description: >-
                                    Options for HTML cleaning with
                                    html-rewriter.
                                  examples:
                                    - extractMainContent: true
                                      removeBase64Images: true
                                readerCleaningOptions:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    cheerioOptions:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        baseURI:
                                          anyOf:
                                            - type: string
                                            - not: {}
                                          description: >-
                                            The base URI for the document. Used to
                                            resolve href and src props.
                                          examples:
                                            - https://example.com
                                        onParseError:
                                          anyOf:
                                            - type: 'null'
                                            - {}
                                          description: Callback for parse errors.
                                          examples:
                                            - null
                                        pseudos:
                                          type: object
                                          propertyNames:
                                            type: string
                                          additionalProperties:
                                            anyOf:
                                              - type: string
                                              - {}
                                          description: >-
                                            Extension point for pseudo-classes. Maps
                                            from names to either strings or
                                            functions.
                                          examples:
                                            - foo: div.foo
                                        quirksMode:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Is the document in quirks mode? This
                                            will lead to .className and #id being
                                            case-insensitive.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                        scriptingEnabled:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            The scripting flag. If set to true,
                                            noscript element content will be parsed
                                            as text.
                                          examples:
                                            - true
                                        sourceCodeLocationInfo:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Enables source code location
                                            information. When enabled, each node
                                            will have a sourceCodeLocation property.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                        treeAdapter:
                                          description: Specifies the resulting tree format.
                                        xml:
                                          anyOf:
                                            - type: boolean
                                            - type: object
                                              propertyNames:
                                                type: string
                                              additionalProperties: {}
                                          description: >-
                                            Recommended way of configuring
                                            htmlparser2 when wanting to parse XML.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                            - true
                                      title: CheerioOptions
                                      description: >-
                                        Configuration options for Cheerio.
                                        Parser-specific options are only
                                        recognized if the relevant parser is
                                        used.
                                      examples:
                                        - baseURI: https://example.com
                                          quirksMode: false
                                          scriptingEnabled: true
                                        - xml: true
                                          sourceCodeLocationInfo: true
                                          pseudos:
                                            foo: div.foo
                                      default: {}
                                    readerOptions:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        debug:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: Whether to enable logging.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                        maxElemsToParse:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            The maximum number of elements to parse.
                                            0 means no limit.
                                          examples:
                                            - 0
                                            - 1000
                                        nbTopCandidates:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            The number of top candidates to consider
                                            when analysing competition among
                                            candidates.
                                          examples:
                                            - 5
                                            - 10
                                        charThreshold:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            The minimum number of characters an
                                            article must have to return a result.
                                          examples:
                                            - 500
                                            - 300
                                            - 1000
                                        keepClasses:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Whether to preserve all classes on HTML
                                            elements. When false, only
                                            classesToPreserve are kept.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                            - true
                                        classesToPreserve:
                                          type: array
                                          items:
                                            type: string
                                          description: >-
                                            Classes to preserve on HTML elements
                                            when keepClasses is false.
                                          examples:
                                            - - article
                                              - content
                                            - - post-body
                                              - main-content
                                        disableJSONLD:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Whether to skip JSON-LD parsing when
                                            extracting page metadata.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                            - true
                                        allowedVideoRegex:
                                          not: {}
                                          description: >-
                                            Regular expression for video URLs
                                            allowed in article content.
                                        linkDensityModifier:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            Number added to base link density
                                            threshold during shadiness checks.
                                          examples:
                                            - 0
                                            - -0.1
                                            - 0.2
                                        extraction:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Whether to perform full extraction. When
                                            false,
                                            content/textContent/length/excerpt will
                                            be null.
                                          examples:
                                            - true
                                            - false
                                        baseURI:
                                          type: string
                                          description: Base URI for resolving relative URLs.
                                          examples:
                                            - https://example.com
                                            - https://blog.example.com/posts/
                                      title: ReaderOptions
                                      description: >-
                                        Configuration options for the
                                        Readability library. All options are
                                        optional.
                                      examples:
                                        - debug: false
                                          maxElemsToParse: 0
                                          nbTopCandidates: 5
                                          charThreshold: 500
                                          keepClasses: false
                                          extraction: true
                                        - charThreshold: 300
                                          keepClasses: true
                                          extraction: false
                                          baseURI: https://example.com
                                      default: {}
                                  default:
                                    cheerioOptions: {}
                                    readerOptions: {}
                                  description: >-
                                    Options for HTML cleaning with
                                    cheerio-reader.
                                  examples:
                                    - readerOptions:
                                        debug: true
                                fetchOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/FetchOptions'
                                  description: Options for the fetch request.
                                  examples:
                                    - method: GET
                                      headers:
                                        User-Agent: >-
                                          Deepcrawl-Bot/1.0
                                          (+https://deepcrawl.dev)
                                        Accept: >-
                                          text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
                                        Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
                                      redirect: follow
                              required:
                                - url
                              title: ReadOptions
                              description: Configuration options for read operation
                              examples:
                                - url: https://example.com
                                  markdown: true
                                  rawHtml: false
                                  cacheOptions:
                                    enabled: true
                                    expirationTtl: 172800
                                  metricsOptions:
                                    enable: true
                                  metadata: true
                                  cleanedHtml: false
                                  robots: false
                                  sitemapXML: false
                                  metadataOptions:
                                    title: true
                                    description: true
                                    language: true
                                    canonical: true
                                    robots: true
                                    author: true
                                    keywords: true
                                    favicon: true
                                    openGraph: true
                                    twitter: true
                                  markdownConverterOptions:
                                    preferNativeParser: false
                                    codeFence: '```'
                                    bulletMarker: '*'
                                    codeBlockStyle: fenced
                                    emDelimiter: _
                                    strongDelimiter: '**'
                                    strikeDelimiter: ~~
                                    maxConsecutiveNewlines: 3
                                    keepDataImages: false
                                    useLinkReferenceDefinitions: false
                                    useInlineLinks: true
                                  cleaningProcessor: cheerio-reader
                                  htmlRewriterOptions:
                                    extractMainContent: true
                                    removeBase64Images: true
                                  readerCleaningOptions:
                                    cheerioOptions: {}
                                    readerOptions: {}
                                  fetchOptions: {}
                            error:
                              $ref: '#/components/schemas/ReadErrorResponse'
                            requestTimestamp:
                              type: string
                              description: Request timestamp for readUrl
                              examples:
                                - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                          required:
                            - id
                            - path
                            - success
                            - requestOptions
                            - requestTimestamp
                        - type: object
                          properties:
                            id:
                              type: string
                              description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
                            path:
                              const: links-getLinks
                            success:
                              type: boolean
                            requestOptions:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                url:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    The URL to extract links from. Must be a
                                    valid URL string.
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com
                                    - example.com
                                tree:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether to build a site map tree. Default:
                                    true
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                linkExtractionOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinkExtractionOptions'
                                  title: LinkExtractionOptions
                                  description: >-
                                    Options for link extraction. Default:
                                    [object Object]
                                  examples:
                                    - includeExternal: false
                                      includeMedia: false
                                      removeQueryParams: true
                                cacheOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
                                  description: >-
                                    Cache configuration for links operation
                                    based on KV put options except for
                                    `metadata`
                                  examples:
                                    - enabled: true
                                      expirationTtl: 172800
                                metricsOptions:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    enable:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: true
                                      description: Whether to enable metrics.
                                      examples:
                                        - true
                                        - false
                                  default:
                                    enable: true
                                  description: Options for metrics for links operation.
                                  examples:
                                    - enable: true
                                    - false
                                folderFirst:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether to place folders before leaf nodes
                                    in the tree. Default: true
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                linksOrder:
                                  enum:
                                    - page
                                    - alphabetical
                                  default: page
                                  description: >-
                                    How to order links within each folder:
                                    "page" (preserve original order) or
                                    "alphabetical" (sort A→Z by URL). Default:
                                    page
                                  examples:
                                    - alphabetical
                                    - page
                                extractedLinks:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether to include extracted links for each
                                    node in the tree. Default: true
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                subdomainAsRootUrl:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether to treat subdomain as root URL. If
                                    false, subdomain will be excluded from root
                                    URL. e.g., if false: rootUrl:
                                    `https://swr.vercel.app` ->
                                    `https://vercel.app`. Default: true
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                isPlatformUrl:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether the URL is a platform URL. If true,
                                    the targetUrl will be the platform URL.
                                    e.g., if true: targetUrl:
                                    `https://github.com` ->
                                    `https://github.com/lumpinif`. Default:
                                    false
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                metadata:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: Whether to extract metadata from the page.
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                cleanedHtml:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: Whether to return cleaned HTML.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                robots:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: Whether to fetch and parse robots.txt.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                sitemapXML:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: >-
                                    ( NOTE: sitemapXML is not stable yet, please
                                    use with caution. It may not work as
                                    expected. ) Whether to fetch and parse
                                    sitemap.xml.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                metadataOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/MetadataOptions'
                                  description: Options for metadata extraction.
                                  examples:
                                    - title: true
                                      description: true
                                      language: true
                                      canonical: true
                                      robots: true
                                      author: true
                                      keywords: true
                                      favicon: true
                                      openGraph: true
                                      twitter: true
                                cleaningProcessor:
                                  enum:
                                    - cheerio-reader
                                    - html-rewriter
                                  default: cheerio-reader
                                  description: The cleaning processor to use.
                                  examples:
                                    - cheerio-reader
                                    - html-rewriter
                                htmlRewriterOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/HTMLRewriterOptions'
                                  description: >-
                                    Options for HTML cleaning with
                                    html-rewriter.
                                  examples:
                                    - extractMainContent: true
                                      removeBase64Images: true
                                readerCleaningOptions:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    cheerioOptions:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        baseURI:
                                          anyOf:
                                            - type: string
                                            - not: {}
                                          description: >-
                                            The base URI for the document. Used to
                                            resolve href and src props.
                                          examples:
                                            - https://example.com
                                        onParseError:
                                          anyOf:
                                            - type: 'null'
                                            - {}
                                          description: Callback for parse errors.
                                          examples:
                                            - null
                                        pseudos:
                                          type: object
                                          propertyNames:
                                            type: string
                                          additionalProperties:
                                            anyOf:
                                              - type: string
                                              - {}
                                          description: >-
                                            Extension point for pseudo-classes. Maps
                                            from names to either strings or
                                            functions.
                                          examples:
                                            - foo: div.foo
                                        quirksMode:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Is the document in quirks mode? This
                                            will lead to .className and #id being
                                            case-insensitive.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                        scriptingEnabled:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            The scripting flag. If set to true,
                                            noscript element content will be parsed
                                            as text.
                                          examples:
                                            - true
                                        sourceCodeLocationInfo:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Enables source code location
                                            information. When enabled, each node
                                            will have a sourceCodeLocation property.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                        treeAdapter:
                                          description: Specifies the resulting tree format.
                                        xml:
                                          anyOf:
                                            - type: boolean
                                            - type: object
                                              propertyNames:
                                                type: string
                                              additionalProperties: {}
                                          description: >-
                                            Recommended way of configuring
                                            htmlparser2 when wanting to parse XML.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                            - true
                                      title: CheerioOptions
                                      description: >-
                                        Configuration options for Cheerio.
                                        Parser-specific options are only
                                        recognized if the relevant parser is
                                        used.
                                      examples:
                                        - baseURI: https://example.com
                                          quirksMode: false
                                          scriptingEnabled: true
                                        - xml: true
                                          sourceCodeLocationInfo: true
                                          pseudos:
                                            foo: div.foo
                                      default: {}
                                    readerOptions:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        debug:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: Whether to enable logging.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                        maxElemsToParse:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            The maximum number of elements to parse.
                                            0 means no limit.
                                          examples:
                                            - 0
                                            - 1000
                                        nbTopCandidates:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            The number of top candidates to consider
                                            when analysing competition among
                                            candidates.
                                          examples:
                                            - 5
                                            - 10
                                        charThreshold:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            The minimum number of characters an
                                            article must have to return a result.
                                          examples:
                                            - 500
                                            - 300
                                            - 1000
                                        keepClasses:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Whether to preserve all classes on HTML
                                            elements. When false, only
                                            classesToPreserve are kept.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                            - true
                                        classesToPreserve:
                                          type: array
                                          items:
                                            type: string
                                          description: >-
                                            Classes to preserve on HTML elements
                                            when keepClasses is false.
                                          examples:
                                            - - article
                                              - content
                                            - - post-body
                                              - main-content
                                        disableJSONLD:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Whether to skip JSON-LD parsing when
                                            extracting page metadata.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                            - true
                                        allowedVideoRegex:
                                          not: {}
                                          description: >-
                                            Regular expression for video URLs
                                            allowed in article content.
                                        linkDensityModifier:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            Number added to base link density
                                            threshold during shadiness checks.
                                          examples:
                                            - 0
                                            - -0.1
                                            - 0.2
                                        extraction:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Whether to perform full extraction. When
                                            false,
                                            content/textContent/length/excerpt will
                                            be null.
                                          examples:
                                            - true
                                            - false
                                        baseURI:
                                          type: string
                                          description: Base URI for resolving relative URLs.
                                          examples:
                                            - https://example.com
                                            - https://blog.example.com/posts/
                                      title: ReaderOptions
                                      description: >-
                                        Configuration options for the
                                        Readability library. All options are
                                        optional.
                                      examples:
                                        - debug: false
                                          maxElemsToParse: 0
                                          nbTopCandidates: 5
                                          charThreshold: 500
                                          keepClasses: false
                                          extraction: true
                                        - charThreshold: 300
                                          keepClasses: true
                                          extraction: false
                                          baseURI: https://example.com
                                      default: {}
                                  default:
                                    cheerioOptions: {}
                                    readerOptions: {}
                                  description: >-
                                    Options for HTML cleaning with
                                    cheerio-reader.
                                  examples:
                                    - readerOptions:
                                        debug: true
                                fetchOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/FetchOptions'
                                  description: Options for the fetch request.
                                  examples:
                                    - method: GET
                                      headers:
                                        User-Agent: >-
                                          Deepcrawl-Bot/1.0
                                          (+https://deepcrawl.dev)
                                        Accept: >-
                                          text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
                                        Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
                                      redirect: follow
                              required:
                                - url
                              title: LinksOptions
                              description: >-
                                Configuration options for links extraction
                                operation
                              examples:
                                - url: https://example.com
                                  tree: true
                            error:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                requestId:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    Unique identifier (request ID) for the
                                    activity log entry
                                  examples:
                                    - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                                success:
                                  const: false
                                  description: Indicates that the operation failed
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                requestUrl:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    The URL, raw url, that was requested to be
                                    processed and might be different from the
                                    target url
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com/article#fragment
                                targetUrl:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    The URL that was being processed when the
                                    error occurred
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com/article
                                timestamp:
                                  type: string
                                  description: ISO timestamp when the error occurred
                                  examples:
                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                error:
                                  type: string
                                  description: Error message describing what went wrong
                                  examples:
                                    - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                tree:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    url:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The URL of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com/about
                                    rootUrl:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        The root URL of the website being
                                        crawled
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com
                                    name:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The display name or title of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - About Us
                                    totalUrls:
                                      type: number
                                      description: >-
                                        Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                        entire tree
                                      examples:
                                        - 150
                                    lastUpdated:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        crawled
                                      examples:
                                        - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                    lastVisited:
                                      anyOf:
                                        - type: string
                                        - type: 'null'
                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        visited (null if never visited)
                                      examples:
                                        - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                    error:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        Error message if there was an issue
                                        processing this page
                                      examples:
                                        - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                    metadata:
                                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                      title: PageMetadata
                                      description: >-
                                        Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                        description, etc.)
                                    cleanedHtml:
                                      type: string
                                      description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                    extractedLinks:
                                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                      title: ExtractedLinks
                                      description: >-
                                        Links found on this page, categorized by
                                        type
                                    skippedUrls:
                                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                      title: SkippedLinks
                                      description: >-
                                        URLs that were skipped during processing
                                        with reasons
                                    children:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: object
                                        properties:
                                          url:
                                            type: string
                                            description: The URL of this page
                                            examples:
                                              - https://example.com/about
                                          rootUrl:
                                            type: string
                                            description: >-
                                              The root URL of the website being
                                              crawled
                                            examples:
                                              - https://example.com
                                          name:
                                            type: string
                                            description: The display name or title of this page
                                            examples:
                                              - About Us
                                          totalUrls:
                                            type: number
                                            description: >-
                                              Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                              entire tree
                                            examples:
                                              - 150
                                          lastUpdated:
                                            type: string
                                            description: >-
                                              ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                              crawled
                                            examples:
                                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                          lastVisited:
                                            anyOf:
                                              - type: string
                                              - type: 'null'
                                            description: >-
                                              ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                              visited (null if never visited)
                                            examples:
                                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                          error:
                                            type: string
                                            description: >-
                                              Error message if there was an issue
                                              processing this page
                                            examples:
                                              - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                          metadata:
                                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                            title: PageMetadata
                                            description: >-
                                              Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                              description, etc.)
                                          cleanedHtml:
                                            type: string
                                            description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                          extractedLinks:
                                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                            title: ExtractedLinks
                                            description: >-
                                              Links found on this page, categorized by
                                              type
