                                          skippedUrls:
                                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                            title: SkippedLinks
                                            description: >-
                                              URLs that were skipped during processing
                                              with reasons
                                          children:
                                            type: array
                                            items:
                                              type: object
                                              properties:
                                                url:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: The URL of this page
                                                  examples:
                                                    - https://example.com/about
                                                rootUrl:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: >-
                                                    The root URL of the website being
                                                    crawled
                                                  examples:
                                                    - https://example.com
                                                name:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: The display name or title of this page
                                                  examples:
                                                    - About Us
                                                totalUrls:
                                                  type: number
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                                    entire tree
                                                  examples:
                                                    - 150
                                                lastUpdated:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: >-
                                                    ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                    crawled
                                                  examples:
                                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                lastVisited:
                                                  anyOf:
                                                    - type: string
                                                    - type: 'null'
                                                  description: >-
                                                    ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                    visited (null if never visited)
                                                  examples:
                                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                error:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Error message if there was an issue
                                                    processing this page
                                                  examples:
                                                    - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                                metadata:
                                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                                  title: PageMetadata
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                                    description, etc.)
                                                cleanedHtml:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                                extractedLinks:
                                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                                  title: ExtractedLinks
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Links found on this page, categorized by
                                                    type
                                                skippedUrls:
                                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                                  title: SkippedLinks
                                                  description: >-
                                                    URLs that were skipped during processing
                                                    with reasons
                                                children:
                                                  type: array
                                                  items:
                                                    type: object
                                                    properties:
                                                      url: {}
                                                      rootUrl: {}
                                                      name: {}
                                                      totalUrls: {}
                                                      lastUpdated: {}
                                                      lastVisited: {}
                                                      error: {}
                                                      metadata: {}
                                                      cleanedHtml: {}
                                                      extractedLinks: {}
                                                      skippedUrls: {}
                                                      children: {}
                                                    title: LinksTree
                                                    description: >-
                                                      A node in the site map tree representing
                                                      a webpage and its children
                                                    examples:
                                                      - url: https://example.com/about
                                                        rootUrl: https://example.com
                                                        name: About Us
                                                        totalUrls: 150
                                                        lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                        lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                        metadata:
                                                          title: About Us - Example Company
                                                          description: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          language: en
                                                          canonical: https://example.com/about
                                                          robots: index,follow
                                                          author: Example Company
                                                          keywords:
                                                            - about
                                                            - company
                                                            - history
                                                          favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                                                          ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                          ogDescription: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
                                                          ogUrl: https://example.com/about
                                                          twitterCard: summary_large_image
                                                          twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                          twitterDescription: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                                                          isIframeAllowed: true
                                                        extractedLinks:
                                                          internal:
                                                            - https://example.com/about/team
                                                            - https://example.com/about/history
                                                            - https://example.com/contact
                                                          external:
                                                            - https://partner-company.com
                                                            - https://industry-association.org
                                                          media:
                                                            images:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                                                            videos:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                                                            documents:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
                                                        children:
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                            name: Our Team
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                            children: []
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                            name: Company History
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                            children:
                                                              - url: >-
                                                                  https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                                name: Company Founding
                                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                                                children: []
                                                  title: LinksTree
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                                    representing a page found under this
                                                    URL. This creates a recursive tree
                                                    structure for the entire website
                                                    hierarchy.
                                                  examples:
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                      name: Team
                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                      children: []
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                      name: History
                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                      children:
                                                        - url: >-
                                                            https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                          name: Company Founding
                                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                              required:
                                                - url
                                                - lastUpdated
                                              title: LinksTree
                                              description: >-
                                                A node in the site map tree representing
                                                a webpage and its children
                                              examples:
                                                - url: https://example.com/about
                                                  rootUrl: https://example.com
                                                  name: About Us
                                                  totalUrls: 150
                                                  lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                  lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                  metadata:
                                                    title: About Us - Example Company
                                                    description: >-
                                                      Learn more about our company history and
                                                      mission.
                                                    language: en
                                                    canonical: https://example.com/about
                                                    robots: index,follow
                                                    author: Example Company
                                                    keywords:
                                                      - about
                                                      - company
                                                      - history
                                                    favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                                                    ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                    ogDescription: >-
                                                      Learn more about our company history and
                                                      mission.
                                                    ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
                                                    ogUrl: https://example.com/about
                                                    twitterCard: summary_large_image
                                                    twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                    twitterDescription: >-
                                                      Learn more about our company history and
                                                      mission.
                                                    twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                                                    isIframeAllowed: true
                                                  extractedLinks:
                                                    internal:
                                                      - https://example.com/about/team
                                                      - https://example.com/about/history
                                                      - https://example.com/contact
                                                    external:
                                                      - https://partner-company.com
                                                      - https://industry-association.org
                                                    media:
                                                      images:
                                                        - >-
                                                          https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                                                        - >-
                                                          https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                                                      videos:
                                                        - >-
                                                          https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                                                      documents:
                                                        - >-
                                                          https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
                                                  children:
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                      name: Our Team
                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                      children: []
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                      name: Company History
                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                      children:
                                                        - url: >-
                                                            https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                          name: Company Founding
                                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                                          children: []
                                            title: LinksTree
                                            description: >-
                                              Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                              representing a page found under this
                                              URL. This creates a recursive tree
                                              structure for the entire website
                                              hierarchy.
                                            examples:
                                              - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                name: Team
                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                children: []
                                              - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                name: History
                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                children:
                                                  - url: >-
                                                      https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                    name: Company Founding
                                                    lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                        required:
                                          - url
                                          - lastUpdated
                                        title: LinksTree
                                        description: >-
                                          A node in the site map tree representing
                                          a webpage and its children
                                        examples:
                                          - url: https://example.com/about
                                            rootUrl: https://example.com
                                            name: About Us
                                            totalUrls: 150
                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                            lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                            metadata:
                                              title: About Us - Example Company
                                              description: >-
                                                Learn more about our company history and
                                                mission.
                                              language: en
                                              canonical: https://example.com/about
                                              robots: index,follow
                                              author: Example Company
                                              keywords:
                                                - about
                                                - company
                                                - history
                                              favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                                              ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                              ogDescription: >-
                                                Learn more about our company history and
                                                mission.
                                              ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
                                              ogUrl: https://example.com/about
                                              twitterCard: summary_large_image
                                              twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                              twitterDescription: >-
                                                Learn more about our company history and
                                                mission.
                                              twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                                              isIframeAllowed: true
                                            extractedLinks:
                                              internal:
                                                - https://example.com/about/team
                                                - https://example.com/about/history
                                                - https://example.com/contact
                                              external:
                                                - https://partner-company.com
                                                - https://industry-association.org
                                              media:
                                                images:
                                                  - >-
                                                    https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                                                  - >-
                                                    https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                                                videos:
                                                  - >-
                                                    https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                                                documents:
                                                  - >-
                                                    https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
                                            children:
                                              - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                name: Our Team
                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                children: []
                                              - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                name: Company History
                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                children:
                                                  - url: >-
                                                      https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                    name: Company Founding
                                                    lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                                    children: []
                                      title: LinksTree
                                      description: >-
                                        Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                        representing a page found under this
                                        URL. This creates a recursive tree
                                        structure for the entire website
                                        hierarchy.
                                      examples:
                                        - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                          name: Team
                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                          children: []
                                        - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                          name: History
                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                          children:
                                            - url: >-
                                                https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                              name: Company Founding
                                              lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                  required:
                                    - url
                                    - lastUpdated
                                  title: LinksTree
                                  description: >-
                                    LinksTree - Partial site map tree if
                                    available, or undefined if no tree could be
                                    generated
                              required:
                                - requestId
                                - success
                                - targetUrl
                                - timestamp
                                - error
                              title: LinksErrorResponse
                              description: >-
                                Error response from the links extraction
                                operation
                              examples:
                                - requestId: 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                                  success: false
                                  requestUrl: https://example.com/article#fragment
                                  targetUrl: https://example.com
                                  timestamp: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                  error: 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                            requestTimestamp:
                              type: string
                              description: Request timestamp for getLinks
                              examples:
                                - '2025-09-12T10:30:00.000Z'
                          required:
                            - id
                            - path
                            - success
                            - requestOptions
                            - requestTimestamp
                        - type: object
                          properties:
                            id:
                              type: string
                              description: Unique identifier for the activity log entry
                            path:
                              const: links-extractLinks
                            success:
                              type: boolean
                            requestOptions:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                url:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    The URL to extract links from. Must be a
                                    valid URL string.
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com
                                    - example.com
                                tree:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether to build a site map tree. Default:
                                    true
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                linkExtractionOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/LinkExtractionOptions'
                                  title: LinkExtractionOptions
                                  description: >-
                                    Options for link extraction. Default:
                                    [object Object]
                                  examples:
                                    - includeExternal: false
                                      includeMedia: false
                                      removeQueryParams: true
                                cacheOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/CacheOptions'
                                  description: >-
                                    Cache configuration for links operation
                                    based on KV put options except for
                                    `metadata`
                                  examples:
                                    - enabled: true
                                      expirationTtl: 172800
                                metricsOptions:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    enable:
                                      type: boolean
                                      default: true
                                      description: Whether to enable metrics.
                                      examples:
                                        - true
                                        - false
                                  default:
                                    enable: true
                                  description: Options for metrics for links operation.
                                  examples:
                                    - enable: true
                                    - false
                                folderFirst:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether to place folders before leaf nodes
                                    in the tree. Default: true
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                linksOrder:
                                  enum:
                                    - page
                                    - alphabetical
                                  default: page
                                  description: >-
                                    How to order links within each folder:
                                    "page" (preserve original order) or
                                    "alphabetical" (sort A→Z by URL). Default:
                                    page
                                  examples:
                                    - alphabetical
                                    - page
                                extractedLinks:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether to include extracted links for each
                                    node in the tree. Default: true
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                subdomainAsRootUrl:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether to treat subdomain as root URL. If
                                    false, subdomain will be excluded from root
                                    URL. e.g., if false: rootUrl:
                                    `https://swr.vercel.app` ->
                                    `https://vercel.app`. Default: true
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                isPlatformUrl:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: >-
                                    Whether the URL is a platform URL. If true,
                                    the targetUrl will be the platform URL.
                                    e.g., if true: targetUrl:
                                    `https://github.com` ->
                                    `https://github.com/lumpinif`. Default:
                                    false
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                metadata:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: true
                                  description: Whether to extract metadata from the page.
                                  examples:
                                    - true
                                    - false
                                cleanedHtml:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: Whether to return cleaned HTML.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                robots:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: Whether to fetch and parse robots.txt.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                sitemapXML:
                                  type: boolean
                                  default: false
                                  description: >-
                                    ( NOTE: sitemapXML is not stable yet, please
                                    use with caution. It may not work as
                                    expected. ) Whether to fetch and parse
                                    sitemap.xml.
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                    - true
                                metadataOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/MetadataOptions'
                                  description: Options for metadata extraction.
                                  examples:
                                    - title: true
                                      description: true
                                      language: true
                                      canonical: true
                                      robots: true
                                      author: true
                                      keywords: true
                                      favicon: true
                                      openGraph: true
                                      twitter: true
                                cleaningProcessor:
                                  enum:
                                    - cheerio-reader
                                    - html-rewriter
                                  default: cheerio-reader
                                  description: The cleaning processor to use.
                                  examples:
                                    - cheerio-reader
                                    - html-rewriter
                                htmlRewriterOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/HTMLRewriterOptions'
                                  description: >-
                                    Options for HTML cleaning with
                                    html-rewriter.
                                  examples:
                                    - extractMainContent: true
                                      removeBase64Images: true
                                readerCleaningOptions:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    cheerioOptions:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        baseURI:
                                          anyOf:
                                            - type: string
                                            - not: {}
                                          description: >-
                                            The base URI for the document. Used to
                                            resolve href and src props.
                                          examples:
                                            - https://example.com
                                        onParseError:
                                          anyOf:
                                            - type: 'null'
                                            - {}
                                          description: Callback for parse errors.
                                          examples:
                                            - null
                                        pseudos:
                                          type: object
                                          propertyNames:
                                            type: string
                                          additionalProperties:
                                            anyOf:
                                              - type: string
                                              - {}
                                          description: >-
                                            Extension point for pseudo-classes. Maps
                                            from names to either strings or
                                            functions.
                                          examples:
                                            - foo: div.foo
                                        quirksMode:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Is the document in quirks mode? This
                                            will lead to .className and #id being
                                            case-insensitive.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                        scriptingEnabled:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            The scripting flag. If set to true,
                                            noscript element content will be parsed
                                            as text.
                                          examples:
                                            - true
                                        sourceCodeLocationInfo:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Enables source code location
                                            information. When enabled, each node
                                            will have a sourceCodeLocation property.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                        treeAdapter:
                                          description: Specifies the resulting tree format.
                                        xml:
                                          anyOf:
                                            - type: boolean
                                            - type: object
                                              propertyNames:
                                                type: string
                                              additionalProperties: {}
                                          description: >-
                                            Recommended way of configuring
                                            htmlparser2 when wanting to parse XML.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                            - true
                                      title: CheerioOptions
                                      description: >-
                                        Configuration options for Cheerio.
                                        Parser-specific options are only
                                        recognized if the relevant parser is
                                        used.
                                      examples:
                                        - baseURI: https://example.com
                                          quirksMode: false
                                          scriptingEnabled: true
                                        - xml: true
                                          sourceCodeLocationInfo: true
                                          pseudos:
                                            foo: div.foo
                                      default: {}
                                    readerOptions:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        debug:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: Whether to enable logging.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                        maxElemsToParse:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            The maximum number of elements to parse.
                                            0 means no limit.
                                          examples:
                                            - 0
                                            - 1000
                                        nbTopCandidates:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            The number of top candidates to consider
                                            when analysing competition among
                                            candidates.
                                          examples:
                                            - 5
                                            - 10
                                        charThreshold:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            The minimum number of characters an
                                            article must have to return a result.
                                          examples:
                                            - 500
                                            - 300
                                            - 1000
                                        keepClasses:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Whether to preserve all classes on HTML
                                            elements. When false, only
                                            classesToPreserve are kept.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                            - true
                                        classesToPreserve:
                                          type: array
                                          items:
                                            type: string
                                          description: >-
                                            Classes to preserve on HTML elements
                                            when keepClasses is false.
                                          examples:
                                            - - article
                                              - content
                                            - - post-body
                                              - main-content
                                        disableJSONLD:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Whether to skip JSON-LD parsing when
                                            extracting page metadata.
                                          examples:
                                            - false
                                            - true
                                        allowedVideoRegex:
                                          not: {}
                                          description: >-
                                            Regular expression for video URLs
                                            allowed in article content.
                                        linkDensityModifier:
                                          type: number
                                          description: >-
                                            Number added to base link density
                                            threshold during shadiness checks.
                                          examples:
                                            - 0
                                            - -0.1
                                            - 0.2
                                        extraction:
                                          type: boolean
                                          description: >-
                                            Whether to perform full extraction. When
                                            false,
                                            content/textContent/length/excerpt will
                                            be null.
                                          examples:
                                            - true
                                            - false
                                        baseURI:
                                          type: string
                                          description: Base URI for resolving relative URLs.
                                          examples:
                                            - https://example.com
                                            - https://blog.example.com/posts/
                                      title: ReaderOptions
                                      description: >-
                                        Configuration options for the
                                        Readability library. All options are
                                        optional.
                                      examples:
                                        - debug: false
                                          maxElemsToParse: 0
                                          nbTopCandidates: 5
                                          charThreshold: 500
                                          keepClasses: false
                                          extraction: true
                                        - charThreshold: 300
                                          keepClasses: true
                                          extraction: false
                                          baseURI: https://example.com
                                      default: {}
                                  default:
                                    cheerioOptions: {}
                                    readerOptions: {}
                                  description: >-
                                    Options for HTML cleaning with
                                    cheerio-reader.
                                  examples:
                                    - readerOptions:
                                        debug: true
                                fetchOptions:
                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/FetchOptions'
                                  description: Options for the fetch request.
                                  examples:
                                    - method: GET
                                      headers:
                                        User-Agent: >-
                                          Deepcrawl-Bot/1.0
                                          (+https://deepcrawl.dev)
                                        Accept: >-
                                          text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
                                        Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.5
                                      redirect: follow
                              required:
                                - url
                              title: LinksOptions
                              description: >-
                                Configuration options for links extraction
                                operation
                              examples:
                                - url: https://example.com
                                  tree: true
                            error:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                requestId:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    Unique identifier (request ID) for the
                                    activity log entry
                                  examples:
                                    - 123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000
                                success:
                                  const: false
                                  description: Indicates that the operation failed
                                  examples:
                                    - false
                                requestUrl:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    The URL, raw url, that was requested to be
                                    processed and might be different from the
                                    target url
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com/article#fragment
                                targetUrl:
                                  type: string
                                  description: >-
                                    The URL that was being processed when the
                                    error occurred
                                  examples:
                                    - https://example.com/article
                                timestamp:
                                  type: string
                                  description: ISO timestamp when the error occurred
                                  examples:
                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                error:
                                  type: string
                                  description: Error message describing what went wrong
                                  examples:
                                    - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                tree:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    url:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The URL of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com/about
                                    rootUrl:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        The root URL of the website being
                                        crawled
                                      examples:
                                        - https://example.com
                                    name:
                                      type: string
                                      description: The display name or title of this page
                                      examples:
                                        - About Us
                                    totalUrls:
                                      type: number
                                      description: >-
                                        Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                        entire tree
                                      examples:
                                        - 150
                                    lastUpdated:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        crawled
                                      examples:
                                        - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                    lastVisited:
                                      anyOf:
                                        - type: string
                                        - type: 'null'
                                      description: >-
                                        ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                        visited (null if never visited)
                                      examples:
                                        - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                    error:
                                      type: string
                                      description: >-
                                        Error message if there was an issue
                                        processing this page
                                      examples:
                                        - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                    metadata:
                                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                      title: PageMetadata
                                      description: >-
                                        Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                        description, etc.)
                                    cleanedHtml:
                                      type: string
                                      description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                    extractedLinks:
                                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                      title: ExtractedLinks
                                      description: >-
                                        Links found on this page, categorized by
                                        type
                                    skippedUrls:
                                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                      title: SkippedLinks
                                      description: >-
                                        URLs that were skipped during processing
                                        with reasons
                                    children:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: object
                                        properties:
                                          url:
                                            type: string
                                            description: The URL of this page
                                            examples:
                                              - https://example.com/about
                                          rootUrl:
                                            type: string
                                            description: >-
                                              The root URL of the website being
                                              crawled
                                            examples:
                                              - https://example.com
                                          name:
                                            type: string
                                            description: The display name or title of this page
                                            examples:
                                              - About Us
                                          totalUrls:
                                            type: number
                                            description: >-
                                              Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                              entire tree
                                            examples:
                                              - 150
                                          lastUpdated:
                                            type: string
                                            description: >-
                                              ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                              crawled
                                            examples:
                                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                          lastVisited:
                                            anyOf:
                                              - type: string
                                              - type: 'null'
                                            description: >-
                                              ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                              visited (null if never visited)
                                            examples:
                                              - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                          error:
                                            type: string
                                            description: >-
                                              Error message if there was an issue
                                              processing this page
                                            examples:
                                              - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                          metadata:
                                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                            title: PageMetadata
                                            description: >-
                                              Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                              description, etc.)
                                          cleanedHtml:
                                            type: string
                                            description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                          extractedLinks:
                                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                            title: ExtractedLinks
                                            description: >-
                                              Links found on this page, categorized by
                                              type
                                          skippedUrls:
                                            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                            title: SkippedLinks
                                            description: >-
                                              URLs that were skipped during processing
                                              with reasons
                                          children:
                                            type: array
                                            items:
                                              type: object
                                              properties:
                                                url:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: The URL of this page
                                                  examples:
                                                    - https://example.com/about
                                                rootUrl:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: >-
                                                    The root URL of the website being
                                                    crawled
                                                  examples:
                                                    - https://example.com
                                                name:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: The display name or title of this page
                                                  examples:
                                                    - About Us
                                                totalUrls:
                                                  type: number
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Total number of URLs discovered in the
                                                    entire tree
                                                  examples:
                                                    - 150
                                                lastUpdated:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: >-
                                                    ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                    crawled
                                                  examples:
                                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                lastVisited:
                                                  anyOf:
                                                    - type: string
                                                    - type: 'null'
                                                  description: >-
                                                    ISO timestamp when this page was last
                                                    visited (null if never visited)
                                                  examples:
                                                    - '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                error:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Error message if there was an issue
                                                    processing this page
                                                  examples:
                                                    - 'Failed to fetch: 404 Not Found'
                                                metadata:
                                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/PageMetadata'
                                                  title: PageMetadata
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Extracted metadata from the page (title,
                                                    description, etc.)
                                                cleanedHtml:
                                                  type: string
                                                  description: Cleaned HTML content of the page
                                                extractedLinks:
                                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExtractedLinks'
                                                  title: ExtractedLinks
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Links found on this page, categorized by
                                                    type
                                                skippedUrls:
                                                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkippedLinks'
                                                  title: SkippedLinks
                                                  description: >-
                                                    URLs that were skipped during processing
                                                    with reasons
                                                children:
                                                  type: array
                                                  items:
                                                    type: object
                                                    properties:
                                                      url: {}
                                                      rootUrl: {}
                                                      name: {}
                                                      totalUrls: {}
                                                      lastUpdated: {}
                                                      lastVisited: {}
                                                      error: {}
                                                      metadata: {}
                                                      cleanedHtml: {}
                                                      extractedLinks: {}
                                                      skippedUrls: {}
                                                      children: {}
                                                    title: LinksTree
                                                    description: >-
                                                      A node in the site map tree representing
                                                      a webpage and its children
                                                    examples:
                                                      - url: https://example.com/about
                                                        rootUrl: https://example.com
                                                        name: About Us
                                                        totalUrls: 150
                                                        lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                        lastVisited: '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'
                                                        metadata:
                                                          title: About Us - Example Company
                                                          description: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          language: en
                                                          canonical: https://example.com/about
                                                          robots: index,follow
                                                          author: Example Company
                                                          keywords:
                                                            - about
                                                            - company
                                                            - history
                                                          favicon: https://example.com/favicon.ico
                                                          ogTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                          ogDescription: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          ogImage: https://example.com/og-about.jpg
                                                          ogUrl: https://example.com/about
                                                          twitterCard: summary_large_image
                                                          twitterTitle: About Us - Example Company
                                                          twitterDescription: >-
                                                            Learn more about our company history and
                                                            mission.
                                                          twitterImage: https://example.com/twitter-about.jpg
                                                          isIframeAllowed: true
                                                        extractedLinks:
                                                          internal:
                                                            - https://example.com/about/team
                                                            - https://example.com/about/history
                                                            - https://example.com/contact
                                                          external:
                                                            - https://partner-company.com
                                                            - https://industry-association.org
                                                          media:
                                                            images:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/images/office-photo.jpg
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/images/team-photo.jpg
                                                            videos:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/videos/company-intro.mp4
                                                            documents:
                                                              - >-
                                                                https://example.com/files/company-brochure.pdf
                                                        children:
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                            name: Our Team
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                            children: []
                                                          - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                            name: Company History
                                                            lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                            children:
                                                              - url: >-
                                                                  https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                                name: Company Founding
                                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                                                children: []
                                                  title: LinksTree
                                                  description: >-
                                                    Array of child LinksTree nodes, each
                                                    representing a page found under this
                                                    URL. This creates a recursive tree
                                                    structure for the entire website
                                                    hierarchy.
                                                  examples:
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                      name: Team
                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'
                                                      children: []
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                      name: History
                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                      children:
                                                        - url: >-
                                                            https://example.com/about/history/founding
                                                          name: Company Founding
                                                          lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:37:00.000Z'
                                              required:

                                                      documents:
                                                        - >-

                                                  children:
                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/team
                                                      name: Our Team
                                                      lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:35:00.000Z'

                                                    - url: https://example.com/about/history

                                                          children: []
                                            title: LinksTree
                                            description: >-
                                              Array of child LinksTree nodes, each

                                              - url: https://example.com/about/team

                                              - url: https://example.com/about/history
                                                name: History
                                                lastUpdated: '2024-01-15T10:36:00.000Z'
                                                children:
